A photograph of an annular solar eclipse. A single dark bird is silhouetted as it flies across the bright solar disk under a partially cloudy sky.
A telescope view of the Snake Nebula. Features series of dark winding absorption lanes made of interstellar dust, appearing as starless voids against a dense background of stars.
A fisheye night photograph. A bright comet with two tails is centered above the horizon. The sky includes the constellations Orion and Pleiades, along with a triangular zodiacal light glow.
An infrared view of the Trifid Nebula. The appearance is reversed from visible light, with dark dust lanes appearing bright and radiating more energy than the surrounding gas.
A wide, low-angle shot of a sunset perfectly aligned between city skyscrapers. Warm orange light floods a long, straight urban canyon. The buildings are silhouetted against a bright, glowing horizon.

A twilight landscape photograph featuring a slender crescent Moon and bright planet Venus reflected in the rippling surface of a lake. Thin clouds drift across a soft pink and purple sky above dark, silhouetted trees.
An artist's illustration of a small robotic helicopter on Mars. The four-legged craft features long rotors and is depicted flying over a rocky, orange desert landscape under a pale, hazy sky.
A two-panel telescopic comparison showing two full moons of different apparent sizes. Both lunar disks feature sharp textures of craters and dark grey mare against a deep black background.

A raw, unprocessed spacecraft view of Saturn's North Pole. The image shows a complex, swirling vortex of clouds at the center of a large, geometric hexagonal weather system with high-contrast grey and tan textures.

A wide-angle night skyscape featuring a bright planet positioned between two famous star clusters. The scene displays various stellar colors and pin-point stars against a dark background near the horizon.

A dramatic night photograph of an erupting volcano. A vertical lava plume and glowing orange flows contrast with a dark mountain base. Above, the sky is filled with pin-point stars and faint satellite streaks.

An optical illusion graphic showing a checkered surface with a cylinder casting a shadow. Two squares marked A and B appear to be different shades of grey but are visually connected to show they are identical colors.
A deep telescopic image of a galaxy cluster. Numerous blue-tinted spiral galaxies and yellowish elliptical galaxies are scattered across the dark void, some showing distorted and interacting shapes.
A color-coded radar map of a planet's north pole. Yellow highlights indicate highly reflective, bright regions within the floors and walls of impact craters on a circular, textured terrain.

A colorful telescopic view of a star-forming nebula. Red-glowing hydrogen gas is interwoven with dark, intricate dust filaments. Luminous stars are scattered throughout the chaotic, textured cosmic cloud.

A sharp telescopic series showing Jupiter's banded atmosphere. The planet's Great Red Spot and various cloud zones are visible, along with a small, circular moon and its dark shadow transiting the disk.
A 360-degree panorama from a planetary surface. The wide-angle color view shows a rocky, orange-tinted crater floor with scoured soil patches in the foreground and a high crater rim in the distance.

A high-resolution lunar panorama featuring a stark, grey, rocky landscape. A small metallic lander is visible in the distance. The scene includes wide, shallow craters and the long, dark shadow of the photographer.

A digitally sharpened orbital photograph featuring a shimmering green aurora. The glowing light forms a ribbon-like structure high above a large, circular, ice-covered impact crater on the Earth's surface.

A deep night exposure showing a faint, diffuse glow in the dark sky. The scene includes silhouetted observatory telescopes in the foreground, with the Andromeda galaxy and Pleiades cluster visible in the background.

A winter night photograph featuring four rare lunar halos. Concentric rings and arcs of light surround a bright Moon above snowy trees. The background sky includes constellations and bright stars between the icy arcs.

An infrared telescope mosaic of a massive spiral galaxy. Warm dust is rendered in red and yellow, while older stars appear as a soft blue haze. The image highlights lumpy dust lanes winding toward a bright core.
A composite satellite view of Earth at night. Clusters of golden-yellow city lights outline major population centers and coastlines against the dark continents and deep blue oceans.
A night skyscape of a comet with three distinct tails. The image features a striated white dust tail, a patchy blue ion tail, and a rare red sodium tail, all set against a dark blue twilight sky.

A telescopic image of a barred spiral galaxy. Majestic spiral arms are traced by dark dust lanes and bright blue star clusters. Reddish star-forming regions dot the galactic disk against a dark background.
A telescopic view of an emission nebula with a shape resembling the state of California. The cloud glows in a deep red hue, positioned next to a bright, hot, bluish star in a field of stars.
A space photograph featuring an astronaut in a white suit using a jetpack to maneuver. He is shown attaching a metallic device to a large, rotating golden and silver satellite against the black void.

An aerial photograph of a solar-powered flying wing aircraft. The ultra-wide, thin wing is covered in dark solar cells and features 14 small motors, flying high above a layer of white clouds and blue water.
A multi-wavelength composite image of an elliptical galaxy. Luminous purple-blue plasma jets, over a million light-years long, erupt from the bright central core into the surrounding space.

A waterfront composite featuring a full Moon rising at 2-minute intervals. The moon changes from deep orange to pale yellow, with its reflection shimmered in harbor water alongside glowing city lights.
A dusty, low-visibility landscape photograph from Mars. A rover is positioned on the edge of a large crater, looking into a thick, orange-brown haze that obscures the distant horizon.
A high-resolution spacecraft image of a massive vertical cliff on a moon. The grey, cratered surface features sharp tectonic ridges and a jagged, shadowy drop-off into a black void.

A stunning wide-field view of the nightside of Venus. A dark highland feature is visible through the clouds, surrounded by a bright atmospheric nightglow rim and bright streaks from charged particles.
A night photograph featuring a tall, straight auroral curtain. The light displays vibrant green at the base and transitions into red and rare purple at higher altitudes over a snowy landscape.
A natural-color Hubble mosaic of a peculiar galaxy. The central region features a jumble of young blue star clusters, massive red gas clouds, and imposing dark, jagged dust lanes.

A deep cosmic portrait of three spiral galaxies. One features a spectacular, long tidal tail of blue star clusters stretching upwards. The galaxies are shown in various orientations against a dark background.
A negative-color mosaic of a full Moon. The image is rendered like a photographic negative, with dark rays emanating from the Tycho crater and lunar mare appearing in light, silvery tones.
A telescope view of a massive star cluster. Thousands of young stars are packed into dense knots, surrounded by huge, billowy clouds of red and pink ionized hydrogen gas.

A 16-exposure night composite featuring strange 'quiver trees' in the foreground. Above them, the Milky Way arches across a sky containing two fuzzy satellite galaxies and a warm town glow on the horizon.
A close-up telescopic image of a Martian rock surface. The frame, only 6 centimeters across, reveals fine-grained geological textures and a pitted surface where laser zaps have been applied.
A telescopic image of a star-forming nebula. Intricate red and blue gas clouds are divided by dark dust. A bright red ionization front moves across the center, leaving dense tentacles of cold gas.

A high-resolution orbital view of a Martian crater floor. Annotated boxes identify a rover landing site, a discarded heat shield, a parachute, and a dark V-shaped debris pattern from a crashed descent stage.

A 20-frame telescopic mosaic skyscape. Features a bright supergiant star next to a dark obscuring nebula and red emission clouds in Cygnus.
A telescope view featuring two contrasting open star clusters. One is a diffuse grouping of blue stars, while the other is older and more compact.
A high-resolution spacecraft image of Saturn. Features a stable, six-sided hexagonal cloud pattern at the North Pole, with rings partially visible.
A 3D close-up of a robotic helicopter on Mars. The four-legged craft stands on the orange soil next to rover tracks, featuring a solar panel.
A night photograph featuring an oak tree silhouette. From a carefully chosen perspective, the Milky Way's dust lanes appear as continuations of the branches.
A sharp optical view of the Sombrero Galaxy. Features a large white central bulge and a broad ring of obscuring dust lanes seen nearly edge-on.
A false-color telescopic close-up of the Lagoon Nebula. Features undulating bright ridges and dusty clouds in a region known as the Southern Cliff.
A composite solar analemma sequence. A figure-8 path of Sun images is shown, with a total solar eclipse and planet Venus included.
An HDR telescopic image of a total lunar eclipse. The moon features a deep red color, suffused with faint light, against a starry background.
A sweeping rover self-portrait on Mars. The robot is positioned on a flat, rocky perch next to two small drill holes in Jezero Crater.
An artist's vision of a gravitational tractor spacecraft. A massive nuclear-electric ship is shown hovering near a 200-meter diameter asteroid in space.
A sharpened telescope image of the Whirlpool Galaxy. Features well-defined spiral arms and dust lanes, emphasizing blue star clusters and red regions.
A wide telescope view of the Small Magellanic Cloud. Features millions of stars and two foreground globular cluster balls of white and yellow points.
A 30-second night exposure of a lunar eclipse. A dark eclipsed Moon is positioned in a sky with bright lightning bolts and storm clouds.
A Hubble image of an unusual cloud nebula. Features textured gas and dust surrounding a massive, luminous supergiant star in the Carina constellation.
A two-panel spacecraft movie frame. Shows a solar storm (CME) impacting a comet and ripping away its ion tail against a dark background.
A photograph of the Sputnik 1 satellite. It appears as a polished metal sphere with four long whip antennas extending from its sides.
A telescopic photograph capturing an airplane silhouetted against the Moon. Three small moons of planet Jupiter are also visible nearby in the frame.
A night photograph featuring an Atlas V rocket launch. A bright ascent streak arcs above a field of metallic satellite communication antennas.
A Hubble image of a massive star cluster. Thousands of massive stars are surrounded by natal clouds of glowing gas and obscuring dust.
A sharp color and black-and-white image from a Martian lander. Features a landscape strewn with rocks and boulders, including lander equipment and trenches.
A digital composite skyscape of Orion. Features several parallel white streaks of light from orbiting satellites crossing the background Orion Nebula.
A wide-angle little planet projection of Earth. Features a snowy landscape with long shadows, a bright Moon, and planet Jupiter on the horizon.
A false-color X-ray telescope image of the Orion Nebula. Features a clump of massive stars shown in blue and orange points of light.
A tantalizing color-enhanced view of Mercury. Shows distinct tan, light blue, and white regions across a cratered surface, including the large Caloris basin.
A deep telescopic image of an elliptical galaxy. Features complex multiple layers of emission shells and ripples against a dark starry background.
A close-up flyby image of moon Mimas. Features a massive, 130-kilometer impact crater (Herschel) on a grey, spherical, icy world.
A landscape photograph of undulating clouds. The atmospheric structures feature deep vertical textures side-lit by the Sun, creating a menacing appearance.
A night landscape from Iceland. Features a shimmering green aurora curtain positioned high above low-lying, elongated white clouds and a lighthouse.
A telescopic skyview of two comets. Features a lime green coma and a whitish dust tail against a background with a fuzzy satellite galaxy.
A telescopic image featuring a comet with a greenish coma. The object is positioned near two edge-on and distorted background galaxies.
A digital night panorama from Alaska. Features green aurora curtains reflected in a calm lake, with stars and a bright meteor streak.
A spacecraft image of moon Iapetus. Features an ancient cratered surface with vast sections of dark coal-like material and bright ice.
A deep telescopic view of the Heart Nebula. Features a mix of glowing red hydrogen gas and dark dust clouds around a star cluster.
A single exposure night photograph. Features a dark red eclipsed moon framed against the silhouetted branches of gnarled oak trees.
A wide rover mosaic from Mars. Features the layered face of a mountain and wispy, white high-altitude clouds in a twilight sky.
A dramatic sunset photograph during an eclipse. The Sun appears as two red, atmospherically-distorted pieces rising over a calm sea.

A sharp telescope image of the Whale and Hockey Stick galaxies. The scene features a distorted wedge-shaped spiral with dark dust clouds and blue star clusters. A smaller elliptical companion sits above, while a bent-stick-shaped galaxy appears below against a dark, star-filled field.

A predawn skyview featuring a bright triangle of celestial objects. A slender crescent Moon, brilliant Venus, and pale Saturn are gathered in a 5-degree field of twilight. Earthshine illuminates the dark lunar side, set against a gradient orange and blue horizon.

A color-enhanced electron micrograph of a millimeter-long tardigrade. The creature features a plump, segmented body with four pairs of stubby legs, shown crawling across the textured, fibrous surface of green moss. The lighting highlights microscopic biological details.

A rare telescopic photograph of two comets together in a twilight sky. One comet displays a long, glowing green ion tail, while the other shows a bright, fanned-out white dust tail. Both point away from the recently set Sun over a dark desert landscape.

A false-color, backlit spacecraft view of Enceladus. Majestic icy plumes are seen spewing from surface fractures at the moon's southern limb into the blackness of space. The high-contrast lighting reveals the fine, misty texture of the cryovolcanic activity.

A telescopic star field in Cassiopeia featuring a bright new point of light. An arrow identifies the nova, which stands out among thousands of white and blue stars. Nearby, a faint, glowing red nebula and dark dust clouds add texture to the dark void.

A dramatic morning photograph of a brilliant meteor fireball. A blinding white flash illuminates a frosty, winter landscape and a persistent vapor trail. The scene is captured at sunrise, with warm orange light on the horizon and cool blue tones in the sky.

A night landscape featuring a dusty Milky Way rising over ancient archaeological ruins. Large saguaro cacti are silhouetted in the foreground. Above, a vibrant yellow-hued reflection nebula surrounds a red giant star, accompanied by typical blue nebulae and rich star clouds.

A telescopic skyscape featuring the Jellyfish Nebula and Mars. The nebula appears as a faint, arcing ridge with dangling red filaments. Two bright yellowish stars sit nearby, while the orange disk of Mars shines prominently on the right side of the frame.

A representative-color telescope image of a planetary nebula. A hot blue pool of light surrounds a central binary star system. The structure is characterized by an unusual overall shape and cool, dark filamentary dust lanes running across the glowing gas.

A dramatic night photograph of an erupting volcano. Glowing orange magma and liquid rock burst from the summit, while multiple jagged, blue-white lightning bolts strike through a massive cloud of dark volcanic ash and smoke.

A two-panel telescopic comparison of a supernova. The left frame shows a field of fuzzy galaxies, while the right frame reveals a new, brilliant point of light on the outskirts of a distant spiral. The images are monochromatic and high-contrast.

A daytime landscape photograph of a 22-degree solar halo. A bright, circular ring of light surrounds the Sun, which is partially blocked by a silhouetted finger. The halo appears against a backdrop of thin, wispy high-altitude clouds in a clear blue sky.

A Hubble telescope image of a small, irregular galaxy. The cluster features thousands of bright blue stars intermixed with old, faint stars. A smaller yellowish companion galaxy appears in the upper right against a deep, dark cosmic background.

A high-resolution spacecraft close-up of Jupiter's cloud tops. The image features a diverse array of patterns, including turbulent whirlpools, dark swirling belts, and light-colored zones with complex wave structures, all rendered in beige, brown, and white tones.

A high-resolution vista of Jupiter's atmosphere. Alternating light zones and reddish-brown belts form a face-like cloud arrangement. The scene features swirling vortices, large white ovals, and elongated red spots, creating a complex, textured planetary surface.

A twilight landscape photograph featuring a large, steerable radio telescope dish. In the background, a bright comet with a visible tail is positioned low on the western horizon near a young crescent Moon in a soft blue and orange sky.

A false-color telescopic close-up of the Elephant's Trunk Nebula. Features include bright, swept-back ridges and dark, tendril-shaped dust clouds. The nebula glows in hydrogen-green, sulfur-red, and oxygen-blue hues within a star-rich complex.

A digital composite of an annular solar eclipse. A sequence of frames shows the Sun transitioning into a 'ring of fire' silhouette. A silhouetted bird in flight is captured passing through the frame against the glowing orange solar disk.

A wide-angle sunrise panorama featuring a mirror-like river. A long, evolving white vapor trail from a meteor drifts across a clear blue sky. The landscape is frosty and golden on the horizon, reflecting the morning light.

A multi-wavelength panorama of the galactic center. Gray radio wave textures are overlaid with X-ray light in orange, green, and purple. The scene is a complex battle of expanding shells, hot winds, and thin bright magnetic stripes.

A comprehensive galaxy survey map covering 100 degrees. Millions of points represent galaxies, with brighter regions indicating high concentrations. Colors transition to blue for larger systems, and dark ellipses show where foreground stars were removed.

An artist's illustration of a black hole. A swirling accretion disk of orange and white matter spirals toward a central dark vortex. A powerful, narrow jet of particles and light shoots vertically from the top into the black void.

An early evening nightscape of the Grand Canyon. Bright moonlight illuminates the layered sedimentary rock walls. Above, star trails form graceful concentric arcs around the north celestial pole, set against a deep blue sky.

A natural-color spacecraft image of a crescent Saturn. The view shows the planet as a thin sliver with detailed cloud bands and rings seen from the unilluminated side. Moons appear as tiny points casting long, complex shadows across the disk.

A fantasy composite night landscape. A deserted country road leads toward the horizon, appearing to extend directly into the luminous, colorful band of the Milky Way. The sky is filled with myriad stars and dark dust clouds.

An artist's conceptual illustration of the 'Big Rip.' A pervasive field of glowing energy is shown tearing apart a spiral galaxy, with stars and planetary systems being pulled into a chaotic, fragmented void.

A high-resolution spacecraft image of moon Ganymede. The icy surface features bright, young impact craters overlying older, darker terrain. The landscape is heavily textured with a complex network of parallel grooves and ridges.

A deep, 17-hour telescope exposure of the Scorpius region. Features include the Milky Way plane, the 'Dark River' dust bands, and the bright orange star Antares. The scene is filled with red emission and blue reflection nebulae.

A Hubble telescope image of a planetary nebula resembling a glowing eye. A hot central star is surrounded by complex, streamer-like gas features and translucent shells in vibrant blue, green, and orange tones.

A dramatic telescopic skyscape of the Pelican Nebula. A false-color ridge of emission gas spans the frame, featuring fantastic dark shapes and clouds of cool dust sculpted into sculptural, three-dimensional forms against a star field.

A twilight landscape photograph featuring a comet and a crescent Moon. The comet appears as a dim star with a faint tail near the western horizon. The scene is captured in a soft orange and blue evening sky.

A photograph from the Martian surface showing a car-sized rover next to its landing base. The landscape is a flat, rocky plain with orange soil. The image was captured by a remote camera deployed on the ground.

A sharp telescope image of Thor's Helmet nebula. The structure features a hat-shaped central cloud with wing-like appendages. Vibrant blue-green emission from oxygen atoms highlights the intricate filamentary structures against a dark starry background.

A Hubble telescope image of a light echo. A bright central star is surrounded by expanding, concentric rings of reflected light. The interstellar dust creates complex, textured patterns in shades of red, orange, and brown.

A high-resolution natural-color mosaic of Saturn's rings. The image shows thousands of individual ringlets and major gaps, captured from the unlit side. A distance scale in kilometers is provided along the bottom.

A gravity map of the Moon from the GRAIL mission. Regions of lighter gravity are rendered in blue, while stronger gravity is shown in red. The spherical surface features cratered textures and global elevation patterns.

A deep telescopic image of the Orion Nebula. Assigned colors highlight emission from oxygen and hydrogen gas. The scene features billowy wisps and sheets of dust and gas surrounding the bright stars of the Trapezium cluster.

A sharp telescope view of the Tadpole Galaxy. The disrupted spiral features a spectacular, 280,000 light-year long tail of bright blue star clusters, set against a backdrop of distant, fuzzy galaxies.

A near-midnight twilight sky featuring silvery, rippled noctilucent clouds near the horizon. The foreground shows the bright, yellow-green flashes of fireflies over a dark field, creating a double layer of glowing phenomena.

A wide-angle night photograph of an urban sky featuring a bright comet. A telescopic inset shows the comet's greatly expanded, golden-yellow coma. The main scene includes the city's orange light glow and constellations.

A side-by-side telescopic comparison of two full moons. One lunar disk appears significantly larger (perigee) than the other (apogee), both showing sharp, high-contrast textures of craters and dark mare.

A picturesque sunrise photograph at Stonehenge. The Sun's large glowing orb rises behind ancient stone monoliths, with fog and trees in the foreground and a soft layer of orange-tinted clouds in the sky.

An expansive telescopic view of the Great Carina Nebula. Features include glowing red filaments of gas, dark cosmic dust clouds, and the brilliant massive star Eta Carinae near the central dark notch.

An infrared Hubble image of galaxy cluster Abell 68 acting as a gravitational lens. Multiple distorted, magnified images of a background galaxy resemble space invaders, seen alongside elongated streaks and arcs.

A breathtaking night panorama from a high volcanic summit. The Milky Way arches over a layer of clouds with an eerie greenish glow from city lights. Two observatory domes anchor the star-filled horizon.

A sharp telescopic view of a dense globular star cluster. Hundreds of thousands of stars are packed into a luminous core, with individual red giant and blue giant stars distinguishable on the outskirts.
A deep-sky photograph of a red eclipsed Moon. The moon features a faint, colorful corona from thin clouds, with the heart of the Milky Way galaxy visible in the distant background.
A telephoto twilight photograph. A bright comet with a long, curving dust tail is positioned in the sky as if streaming away from the silhouetted towers of a mountaintop castle.
A high-resolution image of a young star system. Features a rotating dust disk with visible gaps (radio) and a long, narrow outward-moving gas jet (visible light) expelling from the center.
A night photograph featuring an eerie, colorful network of high-altitude noctilucent clouds. The clouds glow with a blue and white luminescence against a dark twilight sky over a rural horizon.
A sunrise photograph featuring a partially eclipsed Sun. The solar disk appears as a bright, orange crescent rising above a dark fishing pier and a calm sea in the morning twilight.
An infrared portrait of a neighboring galaxy. Blue hues indicate warm dust around young stars, while red and green reveal cooler regions. The bright Tarantula Nebula stands out as a prominent knot.

A 90-degree panorama of the Milky Way's galactic disk. The band of light features millions of stars, dark dust lanes, red emission nebulae, and blue reflection regions, creating a dense cosmic tapestry.
A Hubble image of the Ghost Head Nebula. Two bright white circular features resemble the eyes of a fictional ghost within a star-forming region of glowing red and yellow gas.
A telescopic image of a fuzzy yellow comet. The object appears significantly larger than the surrounding point-like stars, which are slightly blurred by atmospheric effects in the dark sky.
A detailed Hubble panorama of the Carina Nebula. Features a massive, light-year long pillar of gas and dust with energetic jets and newly formed stars emerging from its sculptural structure.
A sharp telescope view of two interacting galaxies. A 75,000 light-year long cosmic bridge of stars and gas joins a face-on spiral and a twisted edge-on spiral with a polar ring.
A false-color infrared image of Saturn. The rings reflect blue light, the planet glows in red, and a vibrant green southern auroral band is visible near the pole.
A cosmic microwave background map. The all-sky view is a complex tapestry of hot (red) and cold (blue) temperature patterns, representing the oldest detectable surface in the universe.
A night panorama featuring a large waterfall in the foreground. Brilliant green auroras dance in the sky above, where a faint comet is visible near the horizon among point-like stars.

A panoramic vista of a large Martian crater. The wide, stadium-sized crevice features deep stacks of orange and tan sedimentary layers. The far rim is visible in the distance, rising above the crater floor. A rocky alcove in the foreground shows high-resolution geological textures under a hazy sky.

A twilight landscape featuring a naked-eye comet peeking above the western horizon. The scene includes the thin, flattened crescent of a young Moon. A subtly lit telescope dome is perched on a mountain peak above a dense layer of white clouds against a colorful evening sky.

A night time-lapse series of a total lunar eclipse. A sequence of Moon disks transition from white to deep red as they sink toward a rugged mountain range. The background sky features the diffuse starlight of the Milky Way, with a silhouetted radio telescope dish in the foreground.

A telescopic view of an Atlantic sunrise during an annular solar eclipse. The Sun is flattened and distorted into a bright orange crescent shape by atmospheric refraction. The glowing silhouette of the Moon creates a 'horns' effect against the morning sky over the ocean horizon.

A close-up photograph of a moon rover's wheel and fender. The machinery is covered in a layer of fine, grey, gritty dust. An ingenious repair using spare maps, clamps, and a grey strip of duct tape is visible on the textured metallic surface.

A telescopic view of a comet appearing as a round, fuzzy golden cloud. The bright central region shows variations in texture within the dusty coma. The object stands out as a large, soft-edged orb against a dark sky filled with point-like stars.

A landscape photograph of a low rainbow appearing over the horizon. Only the very top of the colorful circular arc is visible above the city skyline. The Eiffel Tower is silhouetted in the center against a moody, rain-filled sky during a twilight storm.

A digital composite of a solar eclipse. The scene features an orange-colored sky with a detailed solar chromosphere texture. A dark lunar disk is captured transiting the Sun's edge, where several small, pinkish prominences are visible against the textured solar surface.

A spacecraft snapshot showing thin planetary rings slicing horizontally across the frame. Three moons of different sizes are visible: one large and cratered in the center, one shiny and small to the right, and one partially blocked by the planet's dark night side on the left.

A labeled artist's illustration showing a dwarf galaxy and its associated tidal stream. The wispy, ribbon-like structure of material is shown in relation to the large, glowing spiral disk and central bulge of the Milky Way Galaxy against a black void.

A sharp Hubble image of the Orion Nebula. The scene features glowing gas clouds and hot young stars. Intricate filaments of gas and dust are revealed in high detail, with a diffuse and colorful nebulosity filling the vast 40-light-year expanse.

A deep telescopic image of two interacting spiral galaxies. Beautiful arms are distorted into sweeping tidal tails and arcing plumes. The colorful galaxy group includes a bright core with an active nucleus, set against a background of distant galaxies and point-like stars.

A telescopic composite of a comet. The object features a large, distinctly green fuzzy coma and a long, thin blue ion tail. The comet is set against a dark night sky, appearing significantly larger than the surrounding pinpoint stars.

A long-exposure telescopic image of a comet with a broad, fanned-out dust tail. The tail features subtle, periodic striations. The image includes a superimposed model network of dashed and solid lines tracing the location of dust grains across a dark star field.

A false-color telescopic image of three nebulae. The scene features a large emission nebula, a smaller trifid-shaped cloud with dark dust lanes, and a third nursery. Atoms are mapped to red, green, and blue, creating a vibrant cosmic canvas in the Milky Way.

A detailed color composite of a supernova shock wave. Thin, braided filaments of glowing red and blue-green gas appear as long ripples in a sheet. The elongated Pencil Nebula structure is seen almost edge-on against a dense field of background stars.

A digitally recast contour map of galaxies. Over two million points form a web-like structure of filaments and clusters. Bright regions denote high galaxy concentrations, with blue colors indicating larger systems across a vast one-billion-light-year deep field.

A side-by-side comparison of two circular objects. One is a cratered moon in space, and the other is the textured bottom of a used frying pan. Both features share remarkably similar pitted and pockmarked visual properties against plain backgrounds.

A wide-angle night photograph featuring a pale, luminous trail of light arcing through the sky. The glowing celestial band is cut by dark swaths of obscuring dust clouds, appearing as a milky path across a dark, moonless firmament filled with stars.

A 30-second night exposure. A brilliant planet and a strongly overexposed waning crescent Moon are paired in the sky. A bright white streak from a spacecraft transit crosses the frame above a silhouetted multi-mirrored telescope unit in the foreground.

A deep telescopic image of a molecular cloud complex. A faint reflection nebula takes on a shape reminiscent of a horse's head. The fine dust appears dark and blue as it reflects the light of nearby energetic stars against a star-filled background.

A composite image comparing a Martian rock mesa to a human face. High-resolution views reveal the natural, eroded textures of the rocky formation, contrasting with lower-resolution illusory interpretations. The scene highlights geological shapes and shadows on the planet's surface.

A two-panel telescopic comparison of the Sun. Both images are captured with the same equipment, showing the solar disk at perihelion (left) and aphelion. The composite reveals a subtle 3 percent difference in the Sun's apparent diameter between the two orbital points.

A deep telescopic image of a comet with a greenish coma and a complex, tentacled blue ion tail resembling a jellyfish. An inset shows a detailed view of the tail disconnecting from the core. The gas molecules fluoresce in bright blue and green.

An artist's illustration of a high-energy particle shower. A bright streak representing a cosmic ray strikes Earth's atmosphere, creating a cascading cone of secondary particles. An active galaxy with a central jet is digitally superposed at the top against a black void.

A colorful telescopic portrait of the Black Eye Galaxy. Enormous dark dust clouds obscure the near side of the bright central region. The galaxy features a reddish glow of hydrogen and concentric, counter-rotating systems of stars in a high-detail composite.

A composite night image of Saturn and its moons. A series of short exposures of the bright, ringed planet is combined with long exposures showing its satellites as moving points of light. One large moon is seen making a nearly complete circular orbit.

An orbital photograph of Earth showing a diffuse day-to-night terminator line. Cloud tops reflect a soft red twilight glow filtered through the atmosphere. A clear blue high-altitude layer is visible along the upper edge, fading into the deep blackness of space.

A telescopic image showing a comet with a long tail passing near a large spiral galaxy. The comet on the lower left and the Andromeda galaxy appear to be similar in angular size, set against a dark background filled with distant stars.

A night landscape featuring a comet and a spiral galaxy in the same field. Both objects are immersed in the faint green glow of northern lights. The Milky Way arcs over a snowy field with two distinct star clusters visible in the sky.

A sharp telescopic snapshot of the Cigar Galaxy. The elongated spiral features long, reddish outflow filaments of hydrogen gas erupting from its central regions. The composite image shows a turbulent mix of star clusters and dust lanes across the galaxy's disk.

A telescope image of the Crescent Nebula. The structure resembles an emerging space cocoon with complex, glowing gas shells. A bright central star powers the emission, creating an intricate web of red-tinted filaments against a dark starry background.

A processed spacecraft image from an interplanetary perspective. A comet with an extensive, feather-like dust tail is positioned next to Earth and a massive solar explosion (CME). The image features strong shadowing effects and sharp vertical lines from bright objects.

A sharp telescopic portrait of the Crescent Nebula. The cosmic bubble features detailed folds and filaments of blue-green oxygen emission. A bright central massive star is visible within the shell, set against a background of red-tinted hydrogen gas and stars.

A high-resolution telescopic image of a comet's inner coma. The object appears as a bright, fuzzy yellow puff ball with numerous faint streamers and jets emanating from the central nucleus, set against a dark sky with slightly blurred stars.

A sharp telescopic image showing a ringed planet emerging from behind the bright, cratered edge of the Moon. The high-contrast scene resolves lunar craters and the planet's rings, captured in a single adjusted exposure.

A narrowband false-color view of a bubble nebula. The glowing cosmic cloud features a lopsided, bright-edged upper rim. A massive central star is surrounded by complex, windblown gas and dust filaments in vibrant blue and red tones.

A predawn skyscape featuring a bright planet and an old Moon near the horizon. The Moon shows both a sunlit crescent and a faint 'ashen glow' (earthshine). In the foreground, three large white solar observatory domes stand against a glowing morning twilight.

A historical photograph of a landscape devastated by a natural explosion. Thousands of trees are seen leveled and littering the ground like toothpicks, all pointing in the same direction. The monochromatic image has a grainy, weathered texture.

A data table relating cosmological redshift values to the age of the universe. The chart features columns of numerical data and technical labels, presented as a black-and-white graphic from a scientific paper.

A long-exposure photograph from a twilight sky. A very dim, full Moon is captured just two degrees above the horizon. The sky is partially illuminated by the approaching sun, with a large volume of hazy air creating a soft, scattered lighting effect.

A 40-minute night exposure of the Orion region. Features the Great Nebula, belt stars, and the red arc of Barnard's Loop. A bright, wedge-shaped orange streak from a rocket fuel dump drifts across the starry background.

A telescopic image of the Dumbbell Nebula. The planetary nebula features a bright, bi-lobed structure of gas in colors emitted by hydrogen and oxygen. A central white dwarf star is visible within the glowing cosmic shroud.

A stunning composite image of a massive globular cluster. The view combines a dense core of hundreds of thousands of stars with wider-field digitized plates. A distant, small spiral galaxy is visible in the upper-left of the star-studded field.

A vista from a spacecraft side window. In the distance lies the blackness of space and a curved blue Earth. Foreground objects include long, metallic solar panels, a cylindrical airlock, and various research platforms covered in gold foil.

A reprocessed color telescope image of a planetary nebula. A hot purplish pool of light surrounds a central binary star system. The structure features asymmetric shells of glowing gas and cool, dark filamentary dust lanes.

A night skyscape with silhouetted pine trees in the foreground. A bright, round, fuzzy comet is positioned near a bright star in the constellation Perseus. A white satellite streak crosses through the tree branches against a starry background.

A sharp, color telescopic view of a massive globular cluster. Millions of stars are packed into a dense, spherical swarm. Yellowish red giant stars are easily distinguishable among the countless white and blue points of light.

A telescopic image of a blue reflection nebula shaped like a horse's head. The molecular cloud complex is made of fine dust reflecting light from nearby stars, creating a vibrant blue icon against a dense star field.

A wide telescope view of the Pleiades star cluster. The bright blue stars are surrounded by delicate, luminous blue reflection nebulae of dust. The cluster is set against a dark background filled with many fainter stars.

A serene twilight skyview featuring Venus and Mars close together. A young crescent Moon with visible earthshine is positioned nearby. The scene is captured in a soft orange and blue western sky shortly after sunset.

A night landscape photograph featuring a green aurora near the horizon. The glowing light is captured in a long exposure above a silhouetted coastline and mountain range, with stars filling the dark sky above.

A deep telescopic image of the Soul Nebula. The scene is dominated by a saturated red glow from excited hydrogen gas. Features include open star clusters and huge, evacuated bubbles formed by stellar winds in a 100-light-year expanse.

A spacecraft photograph of a gas giant and its moon in crescent phase. Viewed from behind, the planet appears as a thin, reddened sliver of light due to forward-scattered sunlight, set against a pitch-black void.

An ultraviolet telescope portrait of the Andromeda Galaxy. Bright rings of energetic light from young massive stars dominate the view. The image is a composite of 11 fields, showing the galaxy's circular structure in high-contrast blue and white.

A wide-field telescopic image of the Pleiades. The bright star cluster on the right is accompanied by lesser-known blue reflection nebulae of dust nearby, spanning a 3-degree field filled with countless point-like stars.

A sharp telescope image of a comet with a spherical coma. The tenuous, dusty cloud is brilliantly white, with stars visible right through its outer edges. The bright core is offset from the center within the condensed region.

A high-definition television frame of an Earthrise from lunar orbit. A blue and white Earth is seen peeking over the stark, monochromatic, and cratered horizon of the Moon against the blackness of space.
A composite night panorama of a city skyline. The central band of the Milky Way and bright stars rise over silhouetted skyscrapers and a tall oriental tower, reflected in a dark river foreground.

A 10-degree telescopic skyscape. Features a bright comet with a fluorescing greenish coma and a blue tail, surrounded by bright stars, red emission nebulae, and star clusters in the constellation Perseus.

A two-panel solar comparison in hydrogen-alpha light. The top shows a small, cross-shaped silhouette of a space station transiting the solar disk near sunspots. The bottom shows a larger, multi-spired station silhouette crossing below a giant looping filament and solar prominences.

A deep telescopic view of a bright yellow spiral galaxy. Blue arms with pink star-forming regions and dark dust lanes are prominent. A faint, arcing loop of dust appears in the foreground, set against a background of distant galaxies and spiky stars.

A telescopic view of a planetary nebula featuring braided, serpentine gas filaments. The structure forms a bright crescent shape with a hot central star. Fainter, wispy filaments extend to the left against a dark, star-studded background.

A landscape photograph of a vibrant iridescent cloud. The thin, wispy cloud displays a spectrum of rainbow colors created by sunlight diffraction. It is positioned near a dark, thick cloud deck in a clear blue sky.

A wide 10-degree telescopic skyscape. Features include a large red emission nebula with a winding dark dust 'trunk' and a second nebula with bright knots and swept-back ridges. A faint bluish squid-shaped emission is visible within the rightward clouds.

An orbital photograph from a space shuttle. The International Space Station is seen in sharp detail against the blue Ionian Sea and the coastlines of Greece and Italy. The shuttle's metallic dorsal fin is visible at the very top.

A wide telescopic view showing a large blue spiral galaxy in the upper right. In the lower left, a group of five smaller, interacting galaxies displays distorted shapes and tidal tails against a dark background of distant stars.

A night landscape featuring a white lighthouse. Numerous bright beams of light rotate through a thin, hazy fog. A blurred Moon is visible in the background, creating a high-contrast scene with soft, diffused lighting.

A night photograph featuring a snowy mountain peak. A large, multilayered lenticular cloud, resembling a stacked spaceship, hovers nearby. The scene is illuminated by moonlight under a dark sky filled with pin-point stars.

A telescopic image of a gas cloud shaped like a 'claw' or 'hand.' The cometary globule features a dark, ruptured head and an elongated tail, silhouetted against a star-filled background with a large, distant spiral galaxy.

A night skyscape featuring the seven bright stars of the Big Dipper asterism. The points of light are arranged in their familiar configuration above a dark horizon, set against a field of numerous smaller, fainter stars.

A night mosaic from an observatory. Intense green atmospheric airglow ripples over thin clouds. Silhouetted telescope domes sit on a mountain top, with the Milky Way rising on the right and a faint gegenschein glow near the center.

A sharp Hubble telescope image of a comet's inner coma. The object appears as a dense, glowing yellow dust cloud with an anisotropic, non-uniform structure. Several point-like stars are visible through the hazy, light-reflecting coma.

A spacecraft photograph showing a large planet and its moon in crescent phase. Viewed from the night side, the planet appears as a thin, reddened sliver due to forward-scattered sunlight, set against the pitch-black void of space.

A high-resolution 62-frame mosaic of a rover on Mars. The 'selfie' shows the metallic robot chassis and its extended arm on a rocky landscape. A small robotic helicopter is visible on the orange soil four meters away.

A sharp telescopic view of tangled gas filaments. The supernova remnant features long, rippling blue and red waves of glowing gas. The intricate, wispy structure is set against a dense background of point-like stars.

A false-color X-ray image of a supernova remnant. The structure appears as a large, multi-colored 'puff-ball' cloud about 60 light-years across. Vibrant blue and red emission filaments create a textured, circular debris field against a black background.

A telescopic photograph of the lunar surface. A raised rectangular plateau features a brilliant impact crater with light-colored ejecta rays. Nearby is a dark, lava-flooded crater and a long, winding rille valley on a smooth, grey landscape.

An extreme ultraviolet solar composite. 25 combined images reveal a vibrant orange solar disk with bright loops and arcs of million-degree plasma. Active regions girdle the equator, following complex magnetic field lines against a dark background.

A wide telescopic skyscape. A dusty blue reflection nebula is centered within a field of dark dust clouds and faint reddish hydrogen gas. The scene is densely packed with stars of various colors and sizes.

A composite image showing various stages of lunar eclipses. Multiple Moon disks are arranged to trace the large, circular cross-section of Earth's dark umbral shadow. The disks range from bright white to a deep, central red.

A sharp Hubble mosaic of a face-on spiral galaxy. Features include well-defined spiral arms with bright blue star clusters and dark dust lanes. Reddish spots of star-forming gas are scattered across the 30,000-light-year disk.

An orbital photograph from the ISS showing the US East Coast at night. Sprawling webs of bright yellow city lights trace metropolitan areas and coastlines. Two metallic spacecraft are silhouetted in the foreground against the dark Earth.

A telescopic image of the lunar terminator. Two large, ancient craters are visible in sharp relief, featuring terraced walls and tall central peaks cast in bright sunlight and long, dark shadows on the grey soil.

An extreme ultraviolet solar image. A brilliant white M-class flare erupts from an active region near the center of a vibrant orange solar disk. Glowing plasma loops and arcs trace magnetic field lines against the black void.

A night photograph featuring a window-like opening between tall pine trees. The frame captures the vertical band of the Milky Way, with a bright orange star on the left and a brilliant white star on the right.

A night landscape featuring a large spiral galaxy positioned directly above a silhouetted house chimney. The galaxy displays a bright core and faint outer arms, set against a dark sky filled with countless pin-point stars.

A sharp Hubble portrait of a face-on spiral galaxy. The 70,000-light-year structure features well-defined blue spiral arms and a bright central core, displayed in a combination of ultraviolet, visible, and infrared light.

A telescopic view of the Ring Nebula through a diffraction grating. The nebula appears multiple times in specific colors like red and blue, while surrounding stars are accompanied by continuous, multicolored spectral bars.
A gibbous phase mosaic of the moon Europa. The smooth, icy surface features bright plains, dark dirt patches, and an intricate network of cracks and ridges that cast shadows near the terminator.

A telescopic field showing an edge-on spiral galaxy. Features a prominent white central bulge and a thin disk bisected by a dark dust lane. A brilliant white supernova point is visible to the left of the core.

A photograph from a cockpit looking toward the horizon. Silvery, rippled noctilucent clouds and a green auroral band appear together near the edge of space under a dark starry sky above the Earth's curve.

A wide telescopic view of a star-forming nebula. Intricate clouds of gas and dust are sculpted into cavernous and undulating shapes. The scene features hot massive stars against a dense background of Milky Way starfields.

An infrared spacecraft image of Saturn. A massive white storm system wraps completely around the northern hemisphere. The rings appear as a thin blue line, casting warped, dark shadows across the planet's cloud tops.
A cascade of nested telescopic images. Centaurus A is shown from a wide view showing its large galaxy structure down to a high-resolution close-up of a central plasma jet with brightened edges.
A telescopic image of a comet with a massive, fuzzy coma. The object is positioned near a compact open star cluster on the right, set against a dark background of point-like stars.
A telescope view of two side-by-side open star clusters. Both clusters are composed of hundreds of bright blue-white stars, set against a deep black field of space in the constellation Perseus.
A sharp telescopic image of Mars. The planet's orange surface shows remarkably clear dark albedo markings, including the sprawling Syrtis Major feature, and a whitish polar cap at the bottom.
An extreme ultraviolet solar composite. Eleven Sun images from a solar cycle are arranged to show the progression of activity, from a quiet disk to one covered in bright flares and active regions.

A 3D red-blue stereo panorama from Mars. The view looks across a flat, rocky crater floor toward a massive 5-kilometer high central mountain on the horizon. A rover's robotic arm is visible in the foreground.

A graphic illustration showing numerous robotic spacecraft exploring the Solar System. The inner planets and Sun are shown on the upper right, while the gas giants and outer regions are on the lower left.
A 3-degree telescopic skyscape. Features the bluish 'chin' of a reflection nebula on the left and a smaller nebula shaped like a cosmic bat on the right, connected by red-glowing hydrogen filaments.

A seven-image panoramic mosaic from Tenerife. Features an unusual natural rock pillar in the foreground. Mahestically, the Milky Way's central band arcs over a volcano with a peak-top lenticular cloud.
A sharp infrared Hubble image of the Horsehead Nebula. The iconic dark dust cloud is resolved in high detail, showing textured gas and dust backlit by a nearby massive star in Orion.

A massive, dense globular cluster telescope view. Over ten million stars are packed into a bright, spherical swarm. The stars display various colors and concentrations, set against a black cosmic background.

A near-infrared spacecraft image of moon Titan. Nested yellow octagons mark coverage areas for a descent probe. A small yellow dot indicates the anticipated landing site on the hazy, featureless surface.

An extremely wide 50-degree skyscape. Features the diagonal Milky Way band on the left, colorful red and blue nebulae in the center, and several large balls of stars (globular clusters) scattered throughout.

Two raw images from a moon's surface. The left shows a view from 16 kilometers altitude, resolving terrain features. The right shows a surface vista with a 15-centimeter rock-like object on an eroded landscape.
A wide-angle 40-degree night exposure. Features the delicate Milky Way band, the Orion constellation with colorful giants, and the brilliant white star Sirius above silhouetted mountains.
A telescopic image of a gas cloud with a small red ball at its center. The surrounding existing cloud glows with red emission, illuminated by a central nova explosion.
A night photograph featuring a spectacular green aurora borealis. The curtains of light arc over a frozen landscape that includes dark spruce trees and a silhouetted truck.
A daytime photograph of a waxing gibbous moonrise. A large commercial airplane is captured in a fleeting superposition directly in front of the bright, cratered lunar disk.
A mosaic of lunar images of the Moon's north pole. The monochromatic grey surface is heavily cratered and rugged, shown from an overhead orbital perspective.
A Hubble telescope image of star-forming region NGC 346. Features hundreds of young blue stars and embryonic stars along dark, intersecting dust lanes in a faint, glowing nebula.
A high-resolution spacecraft image of Enceladus. The icy surface features long, parallel cracks known as 'tiger stripes,' rendered in false-color blue against a cratered, grey landscape.
A sharp telescope image of Thor's Helmet nebula. The structure features a hat-shaped central cloud with wing-like appendages and intricate blue-green filaments of gas around a massive star.
An interface page from an astronomical archive featuring metadata text, navigation links, and technical rep details in a basic web design.
A telescope image of a glittering star cluster in the LMC. Features 20,000 stars appearing as tiny white points against a faint, fuzzy background nebula.
A wide landscape panorama from moon Titan. Features a boundary between smooth dark terrain and choppier terrain, with white areas that may be ground fog.
A sunset sea and skyscape from Alaska. Earth's blue-grey shadow rises from the eastern horizon, topped by a pinkish anti-twilight arch (Belt of Venus) over a reflective ocean.
A space photograph featuring an 'upside down' space shuttle in orbit. An orbital maneuvering system engine firing produces a dramatic bright orange flare against the dark.
A photograph from an aircraft showing a waterspout. A spinning, vertical column of rising moist air is seen over the ocean's surface.
A spacecraft mosaic of moon Mimas. Features a dramatic sunlit crescent alongside a hemisphere lit by reflected planet-light, showing a crater-pocked surface.
A high-resolution portrait of moon Charon. Features a dark north polar region (Mordor Macula) and a belt of canyons. An inset shows the original grainy discovery image.
A photograph of an ancient manuscript page. Features hand-drawn illustrations of a Sun-like figure and several unfamiliar constellations on yellowed parchment with cryptic text.
A close-up spacecraft image of moon Europa. Features a complex system of parallel ridges and dark-centered cracks on a bright, frosty ice surface.
A planetary surface photograph from Mars. Features a basket-ball sized metallic rock (meteorite) positioned near a discarded cone-shaped heat shield on an empty dust plain.
A super-resolution digitally enhanced image of Mars rock Yogi. The sharp photograph reveals surface textures and a two-toned color contrast on the large boulder.
A near-infrared Hubble image of star LL Pegasi. Features an unusual, perfectly regular spiral structure with four or five complete turns surrounding a central star.
A false-color image of planetary nebula NGC 2440. Features an intriguing 'butterfly' shape with complex, swept-back ridges and a bright white dwarf star at the center.
A night photograph featuring an orange planet Mars. The planet is seen setting beyond a straight stretch of road in a desert landscape with rocky arches.
A photograph of a total solar eclipse. A black lunar disk is surrounded by the Sun's magnificent white corona, with delicate streamers visible against a dark sky.
A scale comparison of three asteroids. Features Mathilde, Gaspra, and Ida as potato-shaped, cratered grey bodies against a black background.
A night landscape photograph from China. A bright green fireball meteor streak crosses a valley along the Milky Way band, ending near a red planet.
A spacecraft image from moon Titan. Features a dark, snaking and branching riverbed and a wide lakebed on a cold, orange-colored surface.
An enhanced-color view of Pluto. Features surface regions of differing chemical composition in visually distinct red, yellow, and blue tones, including a smooth heart-shaped plain.
A sharp telescopic close-up of the Sun. Features a group of planet-sized dark sunspots within a bright solar active region spanning 150,000 kilometers.
A sharp Hubble image of the R Aquarii system. Features a still-expanding ring of stellar debris in a complex, filamentary structure around a central point.
An orbital photograph of Mars. Features numerous white clouds forming above a massive bulge, with a large brown dust storm system visible.
A Chandra X-ray image of the galactic center. Four variable point-like X-ray sources are circled and labeled A-D near a bright central point (Sgr A*).
A hydrogen-alpha video frame of a partial solar eclipse. Features a tiny black 'nibble' on the bright, textured solar disk.
A high-resolution telescope image of edge-on spiral galaxy NGC 891. Features unusual, dark filamentary dust patterns extending vertically away from the disk.
A telescopic photograph featuring a long blue streak (asteroid). The streak cuts through a dense field of point-like stars and distant fuzzy galaxies.
A dawn photograph from a snowy mountain. Features a dark blue band of Earth's shadow and a pink Belt of Venus arch above the western horizon.
A high-resolution image of a Martian canyon's edge. Features thin, well-defined geological layers in steep canyon walls across a 6-mile wide area.
An 8-meter telescope image of the Fireworks Galaxy. Features bright blue stars and red emission nebulae along graceful arms, seen through foreground Milky Way stars.
A sharp Hubble image of ring galaxy AM 0644-741. Features an immense blue ring of new stars surrounding a bright core, with an intruder galaxy nearby.
A 277-second night exposure. A bright rocket streak arcs eastward into the sky, featuring a glowing stage separation plume lit by the Sun below the horizon.
A night skyscape from Hawaii. Features the Southern Cross and Centaurus stars above the silhouetted outline of Mauna Loa, with red car light streaks below.
A deep composite telescope image of the Ring Nebula. Features a bright central ring and looping filaments of glowing gas extending much farther into space.
A mosaic of lunar images showing Pythagoras Crater. Features sharp shadows, central peaks, and terraced walls on a grey, cratered moonscape.
A solar photograph featuring numerous dark sunspots. The spots appear in groups on the Sun's bright, textured surface.
An 8-meter telescope image of star-forming region NGC 2467. Features very young stars breaking free of gas cocoons and a bright wall of evaporating gas.
A telescopic image featuring a faint red smudge (distant galaxy) marked with an arrow, positioned behind a foreground cluster of yellowish galaxies.
A high-resolution mosaic close-up of Cerealia Facula on Ceres. Features a 15-km wide bright white spot with a reflectivity like dirty snow.
An artist's drawing of a blazar. Features a powerful particle jet emanating from a central black hole at the core of a distant galaxy.
A spacecraft image of moon Iapetus. Features a strange equatorial ridge, a 400-km impact basin, and a uniform dark coating over half of the pocked world.
A twilight photograph from a beach. Features a bright planet Venus and a crescent Moon positioned together above silhouetted coastal rock formations.
A Mars Global Surveyor image showing odd intersecting 'waffle-like' ridges. The landscape is covered in bright seasonal frost with small dark spots.
A representative-color Hubble image of galaxy NGC 1808. Features a bright, blue warped disk and a central bar filled with star clusters and dust filaments.
An infrared telescope image of planetary nebula NGC 7027. Features a hot central star surrounded by expelled outer gaseous shells.
A sharp Hubble image of V838 Monocerotis. Features expanding light echoes as concentric rings of light reflecting off complex dust clouds.
A Hubble image of interacting galaxies AM0500-620. Features a foreground spiral with prominent dust lanes sweeping in front of a background elliptical galaxy.
A HiRISE image of a Martian slope. Features dark sand streaks that split into smaller trails as they flow down through light surface dust.
A night photograph featuring a rare, twisting meteor train. The glowing trail of ionized gas follows a non-uniform path across a starry sky.
A false-color radio sky map at 408MHz. The galactic plane runs horizontally through the center, featuring bright sources like pulsars and supernova remnants.
A night skyscape from the Czech Republic. Features Comet NEOWISE with a broad white dust tail and a faint blue ion tail below the Big Dipper.
A high-resolution panorama from the Moon. Features a stark landscape with rocky soil, craters, and the dark silhouette of a lunar module window.
A telescopic portrait of a dark 'tower' nebula. The swept-back dust cloud is silhouetted against a star field and bordered by a reddish glow.
A representative-color telescope image of planetary nebula NGC 3132. Features a hot blue pool of light and cool filamentary dust lanes around a central binary.
An hour-long night exposure. Features star trails in concentric arcs above a metallic radio sundial in a desert landscape.
A photograph from the Moon's surface. Features a rover wheel and fender covered in fine grey dust, with an ingenious map-and-tape repair.
A Hubble Space Telescope image of Einstein Ring B1938+666. Light from a background galaxy forms a nearly perfect giant ring around a central foreground galaxy.
A Mars panorama from a rover. Features a shattered metallic heat shield hull and its impact site, splattered with light red dirt on featureless plains.
A false-color thermal infrared mosaic of Saturn. Shows temperature changes with an abruptly warmer south polar cap and bright hot spot.
A telescopic view of the Trifid Nebula. Features red-glowing hydrogen gas, dark dust filaments, and a blue reflection nebula in a chaotic star-forming region.
A sharp telescope image of the edge-on Spindle galaxy. Features an extremely thin disk with numerous dark red dust lanes and a blue-tinged population of young stars.
A grayscale photograph of an astronaut on the Moon. He is seen adjusting a lunar experiment device on the rocky, cratered surface.
A night photograph featuring an orange laser beam shooting from the 10-meter Keck II telescope into a starry sky to create an artificial star.
A two-panel digital illustration. Left shows 25,000 light-year tall gamma-ray bubbles. Right shows two violently merging neutron stars.
A one-minute night exposure of an Iridium flare. Features a bright, flaring satellite track nearly perpendicular to the surrounding star trails.
A sharp telescopic view of Centaurus A. Features a peculiar elliptical galaxy with a jumble of star clusters and imposing dark dust lanes.
A detailed telescopic view of the Moon's southern highlands. Features large craters Tycho and Clavius with sharp walls and central peaks on a grey pocked surface.
A telescopic Hubble palette image. Features the complex red, green, and blue Tulip Nebula and a curved shock front from microquasar Cygnus X-1.
A Cassini spacecraft view of Saturn. Features serene blue hues in the northern hemisphere and dark ring shadows crossing the atmosphere with moon Mimas visible.
Two Hubble images of Mars. The 2016 view shows a clear atmosphere, while the 2018 image shows a planet-wide dust storm obscuring surface features.
A telescopic image of the Virgo Cluster core. Features bright galaxies M84, M86, and others appearing like a human face against a dark sky.
A false-color X-ray image of the Pleiades. Translates X-ray energy to visual colors, with red (low), green (medium), and blue (high) point sources.
A Hubble telescope picture of the Stingray Nebula. Features gentle, symmetric curves and rings of glowing gas surrounding a central binary star system.
A composite panel of same-scale Solar System objects. Features the Moon, planets, their satellites, and the ISS in a row across a black background.
A telescopic view of the Rosette Nebula. Features a flowery red emission cloud with a central hole cleared by an open star cluster.
A montage of spacecraft landing frames on Eros. A series of images show a lumpy, cratered surface with fractured boulders, increasing in detail down to centimeters.
A sunset photograph from Rio de Janeiro. Features a dark red Blood Moon eclipse rising next to planet Mars above a large crowd on Botofogo Beach.
A vintage 1961 NASA publicity photo. Three astronauts in silver spacesuits pose in front of a tall, thin Redstone rocket.
A 1976 Viking 1 orbiter image of the Cydonia region on Mars. Features a natural rock formation that resembles a human face under specific lighting.
A natural color Cassini image of moon Rhea. Features a heavily cratered surface with unusual light-colored wisps and streaks.
A perspective view of Martian chasmas from Mars Express. Features dark canyons with sharp fault lines, surface collapses, and layered deposits.
A close-up Mars Global Surveyor image of the 'Face on Mars'. The high-resolution grayscale view reveals a complex, weathered rock formation.
A photograph from the Sahara Desert. Features a single three-meter high stone slab that remains from an ancient astronomically aligned circle.
A night composite of a total lunar eclipse. exposures every three minutes track a red Moon and bright Mars rising over a seaside village and gulf.
A telescope view of cavernous nebula NGC 604. Features an expansive cloud of red-glowing gas and dust with over 200 hot, massive stars.
An infrared, green, and blue image of the Martian south pole. Shows a complex mixture of layers of dirt, frozen carbon dioxide, and water ice.
A false-color image of a central quasar embedded in a distorted elliptical galaxy, which is being gravitationally pulled by a neighboring galaxy.
A false-color ultraviolet Hubble image of Saturn. Features dramatic white and red auroral rings circling the planet's dark poles.
A series of drawings of a magnetar flare. Shows a fast-moving wave of radiation shooting away from a central spinning star system.
A sequence of three ultraviolet Hubble images. Shows the daily progression and persistence of auroral rings around Saturn's south pole.
An all-sky map of the cosmic microwave background. Features a complex tapestry of hot (red) and cold (blue) temperature fluctuations from the early universe.
A multi-exposure night photograph. Features jagged Dolomites peaks above white clouds, with the Milky Way band and red Lagoon Nebula in the sky.
A night landscape photograph from the French Alps. Features a red eclipsed Moon, planet Mars, and the silhouette of a goat on a foreground ridge.
A photograph of Fossil Reactor 15 in Gabon. Features a yellowish rock formation composed of natural uranium oxide remains.
A sharp cosmic portrait of the Orion Nebula's heart. Features four hot, massive 'Trapezium' stars gathered within a complex, glowing star-forming region.
A night skyscape featuring the Big Dipper asterism above a shining mountaintop castle (Hohenzollern) perched over a sea of clouds.
A telescope image of a glittering star cluster. An unassuming bluish-white star is circled within a dense field of thousands of stars.
A three-image lunar eclipse sequence. Shows the Moon at the start, maximum, and end of totality as it passes through a dark, reddish shadow.
The famous Hubble image of the Pillars of Creation. Features light-year long gas and dust pillars in the Eagle Nebula with evaporating globules.
A telescopic image of reflection nebula Sharpless 2-1. Features blue wisps of dust reflecting light from nearby stars in the constellation Scorpius.
A sharp Cassini view of Enceladus. Features a snow-bright, geologically active surface with very few impact craters on a 500-km diameter moon.
A high-resolution Mars Global Surveyor image of the 'City' in Cydonia. Features heavily weathered hills and pocked geological textures.
The first direct Hubble picture of a star's surface. Features a large bright hotspot on the red supergiant Betelgeuse in Orion.
A solar spectrum rainbow band. Features numerous dark vertical absorption patches of varying thickness across all visible colors of the Sun.
A false-color near-infrared image of Saturn. Features the 'Dragon Storm' as orange-tinted, convoluted, and swirling cloud features in the southern hemisphere.
A Mars Express image of unusually flat plates on Mars. The terrain resembles blocks of ice floating on a recently frozen sea covered by dust.
A wide-angle Mars Global Surveyor image. Features a substantial dust storm with light-colored plumes blowing across a 100-mile region of Mars.
A sharp galaxy portrait of NGC 6744. Features an elongated yellowish core and blue spiral arms speckled with pinkish regions, with a satellite galaxy nearby.
A night photograph from Death Valley. Features the Teapot stars, a bright Saturn, and an orange Mars above a sign decorated with teapots and kettles.
A night skyscape from Denmark. Features eerie low clouds tinted by reddened sunlight and silvery noctilucent clouds high above a river bank.
An illustration of the AXAF (Chandra) satellite. Features a bus-sized metallic spacecraft with large solar panels and scientific instruments in orbit.
A sharp telescopic view of the Orion Nebula. Features glowing red and blue gas filaments and hot young stars in a vast interstellar cloud.
A night photograph of a rocket launch. The Parker Solar Probe ascends on a brilliant white-hot column of smoke and fire against a black sky.
A false-color image of a debris disk. Features an edge-on dusty gaseous disk surrounding star HR 4796A, indicated by a central cross.
A false-color infrared Hubble image of Saturn. Features colorful cloud layers, a bright stripe in the ring shadow, and moons Tethys and Dione.
A deep telescopic image of the Virgo Cluster. Features a giant elliptical galaxy (M86) and the red-glowing 'Eyes Galaxies' spiral pair (NGC 4438).
A telescopic close-up of the Moon. Features two prominent ray craters, Copernicus and Tycho, with extensive systems of light-colored debris lines.
A sharp Gemini South image of interacting galaxies. Features an edge-on spiral with dark dust lanes and a background galaxy with a bright core.
A telescopic skyscape of the Monoceros region. Features a blue reflection nebula (NGC 2170), red emission regions, and dark dust clouds in a still life.
Three radio maps of debris disks. Features submillimeter emission intensity around stars Fomalhaut, Beta Pictoris, and Vega, shown with distance bars.
A sharp Hubble image of an irregular galaxy. Features young blue star clusters and pink star-forming regions in a swept-back, arrowhead-shaped structure.
A sharp telescope image of the blue Iris Nebula. Features a bright star reflecting off a dense patch of dark dust, with a brown tint from photoluminescence.
A false-color image of planetary nebula NGC 2440. Features an intriguing 'butterfly' shape with complex ridges and a bright central white dwarf star.
A wide-angle landscape panorama from the summit of Mt. Everest. Features snow-peaked mountains, tremendous cliffs, and white clouds below a dark blue sky.
A telescopic view of planetary nebula IC 4406. Features a square-appearing structure with hot gas flowing from the ends and walls laced with dark dust.
A processed infrared image of galactic dust clouds. Features bright bubble-shaped and arc-like clouds with a frothy, foam-like texture along the Milky Way.
A solar photograph featuring hot plasma prominences. The large loops of gas dance continually and are most easily visible over the Sun's edge.

A telescopic view of a glowing nebula featuring vibrant textures of deep red, bright yellow, and electric blue gas. Translucent bubbles and wispy filaments create a complex, cloud-like structure against a dark background, interspersed with small, sharp points of starlight.

A wide-angle landscape photograph of undulating clouds. The clouds feature a high-contrast, rippled texture with deep shadows and sharp ridges. Low-angle side-lighting illuminates the heavy, gray-blue formations, creating a dramatic, sculptural effect over a silhouetted horizon.

A wide-angle photograph of a twilight sky. A slender, bright crescent moon hangs near two glowing, point-like lights. The sky transitions from a deep blue at the top to a warm orange-yellow gradient near the horizon.

A telescopic view of a glowing, red nebula with a shape resembling the outline of a coastline. The texture is wispy and translucent, with varying shades of crimson and pink. A single, bright blue-white star sits prominently to the side of the dense gaseous formation.

A high-resolution close-up of a diamond-shaped celestial body. The surface is rocky, craggy, and gray, covered in jagged boulders and small craters. Sharp shadows emphasize the rough, uneven texture and the angular, bipyramidal shape of the object against the black void of space.

A telescopic close-up of a spherical moon. A massive, circular impact crater with a central peak dominates the surface. The lighting is high-contrast, with a sharp terminator line separating a brightly lit, cratered gray surface from deep black shadow.

A telescopic, stereo 3D anaglyph image of a rocky planetary surface. Red and blue fringing creates a sense of depth on a dusty, cratered terrain. A small, circular crater sits centrally on an ancient, flat plain with subtle ridges and fine-grained textures.

A time-lapse composite photograph showing a sequence of bright, point-like lights arcing across a twilight sky. The horizon features a silhouette of a city with a warm, glowing sunset gradient of orange and purple. The dots follow a repetitive geometric pattern.

A photograph of a sunset featuring a large, luminous halo around the sun. The light is diffused through high-altitude clouds, creating a pale, glowing ring. The foreground shows silhouetted houses and trees against a soft, colorful evening sky.

A false-color infrared telescopic view of a barrel-shaped nebula. A bright central ring of light is surrounded by faint, graceful looping structures. A distant, small spiral galaxy is visible in the corner. The colors are vivid and high-contrast against the dark background.

A colorized, close-up view of a planet’s atmosphere. The image shows swirling, creamy textures of thick clouds with subtle patterns and shadows. One area is notably brighter where sunlight glints off the upper cloud deck, creating a high-contrast highlight.

A three-dimensional computer visualization of an accretion disk. The image shows a glowing, golden-yellow spiral structure with sharp shock waves swirling toward a dark central point. The texture appears gaseous and fluid, with high-contrast lighting emphasizing the intricate spiral arms.

A high-resolution telescopic image of a solar surface. Massive, dark, swirling funnel-shaped clouds rise and spiral outward. The texture is grainy and intensely hot-looking, with bright, luminous plasma surrounding the dark, tornado-like structures.

A telescopic photograph of a spiral galaxy. A bright, sharp green streak of light cuts horizontally across the foreground. The galaxy appears as a faint, tilted disk of soft light with a bright nucleus, surrounded by numerous small, sharp white stars.

A high-contrast macro photograph of ice crystals viewed through polarizing filters. The image features a vibrant, kaleidoscopic array of prismatic colors including purple, blue, and yellow. The texture is jagged and geometric, with delicate crystalline layers overlapping in a glowing, abstract composition.

A sharply detailed telescopic image of a long, thin filament of glowing gas. The structure looks like braided, luminous threads in shades of electric blue and deep red. The wispy, rippled textures appear edge-on against a dark, star-speckled background.

A photograph of a figure in a white pressurized suit standing on a gray, dusty, cratered surface. The visor reflects the surrounding landscape. The lighting is harsh and direct, creating deep black shadows against the stark gray terrain.

A telescopic view of a nebula with complex textures of dark dust and glowing gas. The image features a blue reflection glow around a central bright star, transitioning into diffuse red regions. Soft pink areas highlight the interaction between the dusty and ionized regions.

A high-resolution telescopic image of a cylindrical planetary nebula. A glowing central ring features layers of color, with dust filaments and small globules visible in the outer regions. The structure appears like a colorful cosmic eye with a tiny star at the center.

A wide telescopic view of a string of galaxies. The image features two large, smooth galaxies on one end and a large spiral galaxy on the other. Numerous smaller, fuzzy shapes are scattered along a curved path against the black sky.

A dramatic photograph of a forest fire. Massive orange and yellow flames consume trees in the background, creating thick plumes of dark smoke. In the foreground, two elk stand in a shallow river, silhouetted against the intense glow of the fire.

A digital perspective view of massive vertical cliffs on a planetary surface. The image shows high-contrast textures of red rock, white ice patches, and dark volcanic ash. The sheer drop of the cliffs is emphasized by shadows and jagged edges.

A high-altitude panoramic photograph taken from the stratosphere. A dark, circular shadow moves across the sunlit, curved surface of the Earth below. The sky above is pitch black, while the horizon shows a thin, bright blue atmospheric layer.

A nighttime photograph of a green auroral ring in the sky. The ethereal light glows behind silhouetted trees and patchy clouds. The clouds have a reddish tinge, reflecting the auroral light, creating a high-contrast scene against the dark midnight sky.

A composite night photograph featuring a bright, straight meteor streak. A long, vertical exhaust trail arcs through the dark morning sky. Lighting is low and atmospheric, with the warm glow of the rocket trail contrasting with the cold white meteor.

A wide telescopic skyscape centered on a bright star. Two glowing wings are divided by a long, dark dust lane. The surrounding field is packed with stars, wispy red nebulae, and dark, obscuring dust clouds along the galactic plane.

A nighttime photograph of a brilliant meteor flash. Inset frames follow a lingering, wraith-like green trail expanding in the upper atmosphere. The scene is dominated by a dense band of stars and the soft, glowing green of the persistent train.

A coastal twilight photograph featuring a deep red lunar disk setting over craggy rocks. A bright, orange-tinted point of light is visible nearby. The sky has a soft, bluish-pink gradient, and foreground rocks are illuminated with a faint, warm morning light.
