A hand-painted lantern slide of large, ornate metal astronomical instruments. The bronze structures feature intricate carvings and are set against a clear sky. The image has a vintage, grainy texture with soft, applied colors on stone and metal surfaces.

A high-resolution close-up of a moon’s surface, appearing as bright white as fresh snow. Terrain features smooth plains and complex, fractured ridges. High-contrast lighting reveals fine details of the icy, reflective texture across the technical landscape.

A long-exposure nighttime photograph of a beach. The surf and wet sand glow with an ethereal blue bioluminescence. Volcanic rock stacks rise from the sea. The Milky Way arcs through the sky, while orange and white light rays fan out from the distant horizon.

A telescopic view of a reddish planetary disk. The image shows broad surface shadings, a bright white polar cap at the bottom, and a long, dark horizontal rift across the center. Three prominent dark spots are visible in a line on the dusty surface.

A telescopic photograph of a distant spiral galaxy. A bright, point-like source of light appears near the galaxy's edge. The galaxy itself is a fuzzy, luminous blob with a brighter center, set against a dark background of faint stars.

A photograph of an orbiting laboratory with large solar panels. The station has a metallic, modular design with a windmill-like array of solar wings. It is set against the deep black of space, appearing as a bright, technical structure with high-contrast shadows.

A three-color telescopic image of a dense star cluster. The image features a tight grouping of hundreds of stars, with several prominent, bright red stars scattered throughout. The cluster stands out as a concentrated jewel-box of light against a dark, star-filled field.

A seaside twilight landscape featuring a thin crescent moon and a bright point-like planet low on the horizon. Warm orange and yellow sunset gradients meet a deep blue upper sky. The foreground shows a silhouetted shoreline and city lights reflecting on the water.

A spacecraft photograph showing the Sun positioned above the Earth's curved blue limb. The shuttle's metallic tail and radar equipment are illuminated by a harsh white glare. The thin atmosphere creates a luminous blue arc against the pitch-black void of space.

A multi-panel composite showing global infrared views of a moon. Surface textures are visible as varying shades of blue, orange, and brown. A central visible light view shows a smooth, featureless hazy golden sphere. The panels highlight contrasting geological patterns across the planetary body.

A true-color telescopic close-up of a moon’s surface. The terrain is heavily cratered with a rough, ancient texture. Shades of dark gray and light tan are laced with fine white cracks and jagged ridges across the spherical body.

A night sky mosaic featuring a dark red eclipsed moon and a bright orange-red planet. The luminous, dusty band of the Milky Way arcs through the frame, filled with dark rifts, colorful nebulae, and thousands of pinpoint stars against a black background.

A wide-field telescopic view of a comet with a soft, greenish glowing coma. The background is a rich starfield featuring two large, pinkish-red gaseous nebulae and a pair of dense, bright white star clusters, creating a vibrant, gas-filled composition.

A high-contrast telescopic image of a dark nebula shaped like a horse's head silhouetted against glowing red gas. Wispy blue reflection nebulae and a bright, spiky white star are visible nearby, creating a layered texture of opaque dust and translucent light.

A photograph of an astronaut in a white pressurized suit floating untethered in the pitch-black void of space. The figure is small and brightly lit by direct sunlight, with a reflective visor and a boxy white backpack propulsion unit.

A high-resolution colorized image of the Sun’s edge. Graceful loops and arcs of intensely hot, glowing plasma soar above a bright active region. The textured solar surface is electric orange and yellow against a black background.

A false-color planetary image showing a six-sided hexagonal jet stream at a pole. A central, hurricane-like storm is surrounded by vibrant, concentric bands of red, orange, and green. The map-projected view emphasizes complex atmospheric textures and rotation.

A detailed telescopic image of an expansive supernova remnant. The scene is filled with incredibly fine, tangled filaments of glowing red gas. The textures are wispy and veil-like, spreading across a field of dark space and distant stars.

A Hubble Space Telescope image of a donut-shaped planetary nebula. A bright central star is surrounded by a translucent, glowing ring of gas with soft, ethereal edges. The structure appears symmetrical and gaseous against the dark void.

A close-up photograph of a clear, circular 57-millimeter glass telescope lens. The border is inscribed with fine Latin text and Roman numerals. The smooth, polished surface shows subtle reflections against a neutral gray background.

A contrast-enhanced telescopic image of a moon. The surface is densely covered with rifts and craters, including a massive impact basin with prominent concentric rings. The rocky terrain appears in high-contrast light and dark gray textures.
A photograph from a planetary surface showing a faint, white swirling column of dust on the horizon. The foreground landscape is a flat, orange-red rocky plain under a pale, hazy tan sky.

A composite photograph of a large moon distorted into a wavy, melting shape by atmospheric heat. In the foreground, bright red lava fountains erupt into the night from a volcanic peak, casting a warm, high-contrast glow against the setting lunar disk.

A distant wide-angle view of the solar system, appearing as tiny, dim specks of light against a vast, grainy black sky. The planets are nearly indistinguishable from the background stars, highlighting the immense scale of empty space.

A composite telescopic image of a comet with a bright, fuzzy head and a thin, translucent tail. Because of the camera alignment, the background stars appear as short, repeated white dash-like trails across the dark field.

A Hubble composite of a ringed planet. Swirling purple UV auroral spirals and rings glow at the north pole. The planet’s disk shows horizontal cloud bands and a large red spot, while the icy rings are visible in a tilted perspective.

A telephoto photograph of a bright crescent moon with faint earthshine on its dark side. Two bright, point-like planets and tiny pinpricks representing moons are positioned close to the lunar limb in a dark night sky.

A telescopic image showing four bright, star-like points of light arranged in a cross pattern around a fuzzy yellowish central core. This geometric cloverleaf formation creates a unique, high-contrast pattern against the black background.

A high-contrast composite image of a supernova remnant. Chaotic red filaments of gas surround a bright blue-white central region featuring a spinning star and sharp, energetic glowing jets of light emitting from the core.

A telescopic composite showing a spiral galaxy with long, diffuse dark blue gas trails. The galaxy is seen through a field of foreground stars, appearing next to a yellowish elliptical galaxy against the dark void of space.

A sharp telescopic view of a spiral galaxy seen edge-on. The disk is puffy and bisected by a thick, dark dust lane. The edges of the galaxy disk flare and warp, with a glowing central bulge against a starry backdrop.

A grainy, black-and-white television still showing an astronaut in a bulky suit descending a metallic ladder. The image has a fuzzy, low-contrast texture with high-contrast shadows, characteristic of historic space broadcasts.

A photograph from space showing a long, thin metallic line extending from a shuttle cargo bay. A satellite is attached at the end of the strand. The curved blue Earth is visible in the background against black space.

A wide-field telescopic skyscape showing dark, silhouetted dust markings. These opaque forms are set against a dense, luminous background of thousands of pinpoint stars and colorful nebulae in a deep blue and black sky.

A colorized solar coronagraph image. A dark circular disk blocks the Sun, with a white circle indicating its position. A bright comet with a visible tail and coma enters the frame amidst glowing streaks of solar wind.

A nighttime landscape photograph of a snowy mountain peak under high clouds. The Milky Way arcs above with dark rifts. Bright, bloated planets and a sharp green meteor streak are visible through the misty atmosphere.

A telephoto twilight photograph of a comet with a bright head and a long, wispy tail stretching toward a bright white star. The sky features a deep blue and orange gradient above the silhouetted horizon.

A natural-color telescopic mosaic of a galaxy. A prominent, thick dark dust lane cuts horizontally across a brilliant central region. Winding arms are filled with blue star clusters and glowing clouds of reddish gas.

A wide-angle daytime photograph showing a complex range of luminous white ice halos, sundogs, and tangent arcs surrounding the sun. The scene is set over a flat, tree-lined landscape under a pale blue sky.
A space photograph showing two moons in crescent phase against deep black. One moon is large with a hazy, clouded surface, while the other appears smaller and sharper with a cratered icy texture.

A composite telescopic view of a face-on spiral galaxy. Bright red spots are mapped onto the symmetrical blue spiral arms, highlighting high-energy sources against a dark background of distant galaxies and foreground stars.

A pixelated false-color all-sky map. A planet-like sphere glows brightest at the edges, representing high-energy radiation. The colors transition from vibrant reds and yellows to deep blues against a dark center and background.

A colorful telescopic skyscape featuring bright reddish emission nebulae and dusty blue reflection nebulae. Obscuring dark dust clouds appear in silhouette against the vibrant gas and thousands of pinpoint stars.

A Hubble image of a bright star surrounded by a dazzling blue reflection nebula. The nebula features intricate, rippling textures resembling a light echo. Fine dust filaments spread outward from the center, creating a glowing cloud-like structure.

A vintage illustration of three metallic scientific satellites positioned above a cloud-covered Earth. The spacecraft feature rectangular modular bodies and long antennas, rendered with sharp highlights and clean, technical lines.
A high-resolution photograph of a rocky Martian surface. The terrain is covered in orange-red sand and jagged rocks under a hazy, pale sky, showing a desolate and craggy planetary landscape.

A planet-wide digital visualization of atmospheric aerosols. Swirling red, blue, and purple patterns cover the Earth's surface. Bright city lights are visible as white dots on the dark side, showing the distribution of dust, salt, and smoke.

A deep telescopic view of a nebula. A bright star sits at the center of a glowing red gaseous region, which is punctuated by a long, dark trail of obscuring interstellar dust clouds against a star-filled background.

A wide telescopic image of a dense star-forming region. Yellow circles and arrows mark specific massive stars. The background is a vibrant mix of colorful gas clouds and thousands of pinpoint stars in a crowded field.
A digital animation frame of a spinning neutron star. The star has a bright, hot surface and is surrounded by a complex web of looping magenta magnetic field lines against a pitch-black background.

A composite telescopic image of a blue ring galaxy. A massive ring of bright stars surrounds a central core. Pink X-ray light indicates high-energy sources, and a small yellowish intruder galaxy is visible to the side.
An infrared telescopic view of a young double star. The binary system glows brightly within an embedded dust cloud, with a faint filament of light extending toward a small, isolated point of light.

A telescopic image of a bright spiral galaxy. The galaxy features winding blue arms populated by young stars and clear, dark dust lanes. The core glows with a soft yellow-white light against a star-speckled background.

A Hubble image of a large elliptical galaxy. The smooth, egg-shaped stellar body is crossed by dark, irregular dust lanes. The central region is dense and bright, fading gradually into a star-speckled dark void.
A photograph of a setting sun distorted into a square shape by the atmosphere. The orange-red sun sits above a dark horizon, reflecting warm light on the water surface below.
An artist's drawing of a large, dark gas giant planet and its parent star. The planet is positioned in the foreground, with the star glowing intensely in the background against the void of space.

A radio image of a galactic center featuring long, parallel white rays slanting across the top. Curving filaments connect these rays to a bright, concentrated central radio source against a dark background.

A high-resolution Hubble image of a supernova remnant. The nebula is a complex tangle of glowing red, green, and blue filaments. A small, bright pulsar star is visible at the very center of the structure.

A detailed galaxy portrait of a nearly edge-on irregular galaxy. The narrow profile features a bright core, dark dust clouds, pink star-forming regions, and young blue star clusters against a dark sky.
A composite photograph showing a jagged rock protrusion overhanging a dark cliff. The background sky is filled with thousands of sharp stars and the vertical, luminous band of the Milky Way Galaxy.

A spacecraft photograph of Earth showing the Bering Sea and Alaska. The image captures white ice, blue ocean water, and swirling white clouds, showing three forms of water simultaneously on the planetary surface.
A photograph of a solar eclipse over an icy landscape. A dark lunar silhouette is surrounded by a shimmering, white solar corona. The foreground is a flat, white frozen expanse under a dark sky.

A solar spectrum showing a continuous band of rainbow colors from red to violet. Numerous dark, vertical absorption lines cut through the colors, creating a repetitive barcode-like pattern across the visible light range.
An educational graphic of a night sky. A clock-like layout features colorful icons of planets, constellations, and the space station against a dark blue background with a central cartoon observer.

A Hubble image of a spiral galaxy with perfectly defined, winding arms. The arms are filled with bright blue star clusters and intricate dark dust lanes, surrounding a brilliant central core against black space.
A telescopic photograph of a bright open star cluster dominated by intense blue stars. A dark dust cloud is visible near the bottom against a background of millions of distant stars.

A false-color infrared telescopic view of a dark nebula globule. Winding filaments of infrared emission glow orange-red. Bright newborn stars appear as reddish points within the otherwise opaque dust structure.
A night photograph of a comet with a bright coma and a long tail. The comet is set against a background of glowing gas nebulae and dark dust lanes in the Orion region.
A telescopic image of a crater floor. The surface texture is smooth and flat, with island and bay features resembling a dried pond, surrounded by the channeled walls of the crater.

A computer-reconstructed radar map of a planetary surface. Large circular domes with smooth textures are shown in shades of orange and brown, with high-contrast shadows emphasizing the volcanic terrain.

A composite analemma photograph showing the Sun’s position as a figure-8 pattern over a year. The foreground features a prehistoric stone circle on a hill under various lighting conditions from multiple exposures.
A photograph from an asteroid’s rocky gray surface. A small, pan-sized metallic robot is visible on the jagged terrain. The background is a dark, shadow-filled sky, emphasizing the irregular surface.
A telescopic image of a bipolar planetary nebula. Two symmetrical, glowing lobes of gas in pink and purple extend from a central star against a dark, star-filled field.
A telescopic view of a spiral galaxy seen sideways. A prominent dark dust lane bisects the glowing disk, which fans out at the edges into a faint tidal tail against the void.

A side-by-side comparison of two rocky landscapes. Both feature vast plains of orange-red sand and scattered dark rocks under a pale, hazy sky, showing the visual surface similarities between planets.
A composite photograph of a partial solar eclipse. A dark circular bite is taken out of the bright sun, which momentarily peeks through a gray and white cloudy sky.
A telescopic solar image showing circular waves spreading from a bright, explosive flare. The ripples appear like a stone in water across the grainy, hot texture of the Sun’s surface.
An all-sky neutrino image of the Sun. A concentrated, glowing white and yellow center is mapped onto a mottled, colorful celestial background representing particle flux across the sky.
A telescopic skyscape of a nebula trisected by dark dust lanes. The gas glows in vibrant red and blue. A dense open star cluster is visible in the lower right against a dark starfield.

A deep-field telescopic image filled with thousands of tiny, colorful galaxies. The objects vary in shape from spirals to ellipses, appearing as faint smudges and points of light against pitch-black space.
A nighttime photograph of a small telescope on a tripod. Long star trails arc across the sky due to the Earth's rotation. Silhouetted trees and a mountain horizon frame the dark scene.
A telescopic image of a planetary nebula with blue, orange, and red streamer-like filaments. An intensely hot central star sits within the fluorescent gas shroud against the dark void.
A vintage photograph of a two-stage rocket launching. The white, needle-like rocket features a prominent exhaust trail against a grainy, clear daytime sky over a coastal site.
A telescopic view of a three-day-old crescent moon with jagged craters along the terminator. The dark side glows with faint earthshine, and the Pleiades star cluster is visible nearby.
A telescopic view showing an icy, cracked planetary surface in high-contrast gray. [Text section was minimal in source].
A telescopic image of a graceful spiral galaxy with winding arms and a bright nucleus. The view is sharp and set against a dark background with scattered stars and fuzzy light points.
A close-up spacecraft photograph of an icy moon’s crust. The surface is heavily textured with complex cracks, ridges, and dark, cusp-shaped features under low-angle lighting.
An extreme ultraviolet image of the Sun showing a massive filament eruption. Luminous plasma loops and arcs surround an active region on the dark, textured solar surface.
A false-color infrared telescopic view of a red-tinted cosmic bubble nebula. Groups of yellowish newborn stars are scattered along the bubble’s edge against a dark, dusty background.

A telescopic mosaic of a supernova remnant featuring delicate, braided filaments of glowing red and blue-green gas. The structures look like long ripples in a sheet, seen nearly edge-on against a star-filled background.

A coastal photograph featuring at least five vibrant, supernumerary rainbow arcs. The sky is dark and moody, contrasting with the bright prismatic colors of the interfering light waves over the water.
A wide-field infrared survey image of the Orion region. The scene is a chaotic mix of purple, red, and yellow glowing gas and dark dust, with several prominent nebulae glowing intensely.
A telescopic image of a luminous, ring-shaped superbubble nebula. The rim is a bright circular filament surrounding an interior of hot, tenuous gas in a dense field of stars.
A space photograph of planetary rings viewed edge-on and in shadow. A small, bright moon is visible in the foreground against the planet’s golden, banded atmosphere and dark ring shadows.
A telescopic image of a barred spiral galaxy. An inset shows the core as a miniature spiral galaxy with its own dust lanes and arms within the bright central bar of the larger galaxy.
A false-color image of solar active regions. Enormous loops of hot, red plasma explode from the Sun’s edge, soaring high above the grainy surface against the black void of space.
A wide-field telescopic view showing a large red emission bubble around three bright blue stars in a line. A dark horse-head silhouette and a bright nebula are visible in the field.
A telescopic photograph of Venus in a thin crescent phase. The bright planet appears as a slender white arc against a dark twilight sky above silhouetted hills.

A Hubble Space Telescope archival image showing a long, vibrant blue streak cutting across a dark, star-filled field. Numerous tiny white and yellow points of light are scattered against the deep black background. The composition highlights the sharp contrast between the singular colored streak and the surrounding celestial points.

A wide-angle telescope view showing a large, 2.5-meter metallic telescope structure with an open geometric frame. The silver industrial textures of the telescope are poised against a dark, clear night sky. The imaging style captures the sharp angles and mechanical complexity of the instrument.

Infrared telescope composite of a stellar nursery. Vibrant red, green, and blue clouds of glowing gas swirl together in a highly textured display. Ethereal, wispy nebular filaments surround bright, concentrated points of light, while dense, dark dust clouds obscure parts of the luminous background.

A sharp, face-on telescope view of a spiral galaxy. Loosely wound spiral arms are dotted with bright blue star clusters and soft pinkish nebulous regions. The central core is a concentrated white glow, set against a dark background speckled with distant stars.

A deep telephoto mosaic featuring a comet with a luminous greenish coma and a diffuse, streaking tail. The background is rich with colorful stars and expansive, textured reddish emission nebulae. High-contrast lighting highlights the glowing green gas against the dark void of space.

Telescope skyscape showing reddish emission regions with bright, glowing gas walls. Patches of dusty blue reflection nebulae and dense, opaque black dust clouds create a highly textured interstellar canvas. A small, sharp red fleck of light is visible near the top center.

A sharp Hubble Space Telescope view of two interacting galaxies. A large spiral galaxy features well-defined arms and dark, winding dust lanes. A smaller, rounded companion galaxy appears to the right. High-detail textures highlight the contrast between glowing stellar regions and opaque dust.

False-color X-ray image of a shell-like supernova remnant. A translucent, glowing cosmic shell appears as a textured debris cloud with a brightly illuminated central region. The structure features wispy, ethereal edges that fade into the blackness of space.

Hubble Space Telescope image of an elliptical galaxy's center. A dark, silhouetted dust disk sits within a bright, glowing yellowish core. The texture is smooth and diffused in the galaxy's body, contrasting sharply with the opaque, hard edge of the central disk.

Hubble Space Telescope view of giant, towering pillars of gas and dust. The structures are dense and highly textured, featuring dark, opaque surfaces and glowing, evaporated edges. Tiny, bright stars emerge from the tips of the pillars against a hazy, luminous background.

A computer-generated slice of a universe simulation. The map features a network of glowing red filaments containing concentrated points, set against vast, darker regions that appear nearly empty. The texture is web-like and organic, spanning a wide, dark field.

An artist's illustration of a metallic spacecraft with a large dish antenna. The craft features geometric industrial textures and is set against a dark background representing deep space. The lighting highlights the metallic surfaces and the intricate structural components of the vessel.

A cosmic vista of a galaxy cluster showing star-forming galaxies with a distinct blue tint and elliptical galaxies with a yellowish cast. The image captures distorted shapes and merging textures of multiple celestial bodies against a dark, star-speckled background.

An infrared telescope image of the Moon during an eclipse. The false-color view shows bright, warm spots corresponding to craters like Tycho and dark, cooler regions like Mare Crisium. The lunar surface appears highly textured with high thermal contrast.

Telescope view of a greenish-gray comet positioned between two colorful nebulas. The upper left features a reddish, floral-shaped nebula, while the lower right shows a textured, pointed nebula. The comet appears as a small, glowing green smudge against a dense field of stars.

A Hubble Space Telescope image of a statuesque dust pillar in the Eagle Nebula. Presented in scientifically re-assigned colors, the pillar features a highly textured, dark surface with glowing, wispy edges, resembling a mythical silhouette against a vibrant, hazy background.

A ground-based photograph of a bronze statue on a marble platform beside a small telescope. The platform is embedded with a map of celestial positions. The lighting is soft and thoughtful, highlighting the metallic texture of the statue and the polished stone.

Hubble Space Telescope image of a prominently barred spiral galaxy. The view shows dark, filamentary dust lanes, young clusters of bright blue stars, and red emission nebulas. A long, bright bar of stars crosses the center, leading to a luminous active nucleus.

A telescope photograph of a dense star field. Centered in white crosshairs is a single star that appears to twinkle or brighten. The background is a crowded field of countless tiny, sharp points of light against a dark sky.

Artist's illustration of a supernova explosion. The image features orange rings representing shock waves and brownish bands of dust material being ejected. The lighting is dramatic and explosive, with a bright central burst and expanding conical sections of textured material.

A colorful telescope composite of the Orion region. The image uses digitally reassigned hues: red for hydrogen/sulfur and blue-green for oxygen. A large, arching red loop cradles intricate nebular constructs, including dark indentations and glowing gas clouds, against a star-rich background.

A synthesized color image of Mars viewed from orbit. The red planet features white seasonal haze and water-ice clouds. Two large, dark volcanic peaks are visible through the atmospheric textures. A night/day shadow boundary arcs across the left side of the frame.

A long-exposure photograph showing plumes and exhaust from a rocket. The image features reddish smoke drifting in the foreground and expanding blue and orange filamentary plumes at high altitudes. A bright central spot marks the rocket, set against a fading twilight sky.

A two-image stack capturing a rocket launch and its first-stage landing. The image features bright, vertical light trails and a concentrated glow at the landing site. The scene is set against a dark hill and a deep blue evening sky.

A multi-wavelength composite image. Blue represents X-ray light, while red and green represent optical light. The image features a bright blue dot at the center of a red, textured nebula, surrounded by a larger, more diffused blue X-ray glow.

Telescopic vista of a reflection nebula complex. The image features striking blue light reflected by cosmic dust, creating a glowing, textured appearance. Dark dust clouds block background stars, while smaller yellowish nebulas and glowing red arcs are visible in the surrounding star field.

A telescope image of the Eagle Nebula combining three colors: red for sulfur, yellow for hydrogen, and blue for oxygen. The view shows tall pillars and round globules of dark dust within a brightly-lit cavity, surrounded by young, bright blue stars.

Telescope image of a distorted galaxy featuring a flattened disk of stars and a dense, bright core. A sparse, sharply tilted ring of gas and dust encircles the disk at a perpendicular angle. The system appears as a complex, geometric arrangement of light and shadow.

Telescope view of a planetary nebula with a distinct ant-shaped structure. The image features a bright central star and long, symmetrical lobes of expelled gas. The texture is filamentary and directional, with light-year-long translucent wings extending into the dark background.

A mosaic of five Voyager images showing a blue gas giant. The planet features zonal cloud bands and a large, dark, Earth-sized storm system. Trailing white clouds are visible against the deep blue atmospheric textures of the southern hemisphere.

A photograph of a comet in a night sky over mountains. The comet features a bright white dust tail and a distinct blue ion tail. The scene includes sharp, dark mountain silhouettes and a clear, star-filled sky.

A close-up composite image from the Cassini spacecraft showing a small, irregular moon. The surface is heavily cratered and grey, with dramatic shadows highlighting its jagged, non-spherical shape against the dark void.

A telescope photograph of a standard star field in the constellation Aquarius. The image shows a small, faint red star at the center, surrounded by numerous sharp points of white light of varying magnitudes against a black background.

A snapshot of a new telescope featuring a 23-meter diameter segmented mirror. The mirror reflects a beautiful sunset sky, showing inverted evening colors. The telescope's structure is an open, metallic frame set against a dark horizon.

A creative wide-angle photograph from a low perspective. Green northern lights shimmer in the sky and reflect off a frozen puddle on the ground. Icy pebbles in the foreground are illuminated by a flashlight, appearing like glowing diamonds.

A near-ultraviolet image of Jupiter. The poles and the Great Red Spot appear dark, while a string of pearl-like storms appear as bright, false-color pink spots. A large moon is visible as a small disk on the upper left.

A Hubble Space Telescope image of a globular cluster. The frame is filled with a dense, glittering ball of stars in a wide range of colors, from infrared to ultraviolet. The stars appear as sharp, multicolored pinpoints against a dark background.

A representative-color image from the Spirit rover on Mars. The foreground shows an outcropping of layered, greyish rock. The background features more distant peaks and a rusty red, dusty Martian landscape under a hazy sky.

A photograph from an airplane window showing green curtains of aurora borealis over a colorful horizon. A bright meteor streak is visible below the stars of the Big Dipper, and the approaching sunrise illuminates the edge of the sky with blue and orange.

A computer-generated snapshot of a solar magnetic field. The image features vibrant, banana-shaped loops of constant magnetic field strength. These colorful, translucent arcs emerge from and return to the Sun's textured surface, connecting regions of activity.

A series of time exposures showing a celestial alignment. From left to right, the Sun, Venus, the Moon, and Jupiter are captured rising in a diagonal line. The foreground features a sharp silhouette of a lighthouse and beach.

A sequence of false-color X-ray images showing a small, dark disk transiting a bright solar corona. The background consists of hot, glowing gas with a dark notch at the pole and various flaring bright points.

A computer simulation of universe evolution. The image transitions from a smooth, uniform texture on the left to an increasingly clumpy and filamentary structure on the right, representing the growth of cosmic webs over time.

A Cassini spacecraft image of Saturn. The ring plane appears as a thin blue line cutting across the gold-tinted atmosphere. Dark, curved shadows of the rings are cast across the top of the gas giant, and small moons appear as bumps.

A photograph from the Apollo 12 mission showing an astronaut standing near a robotic spacecraft on the Moon. The lunar surface is grey and cratered, and the lunar module is visible as a distant metallic silhouette against the black sky.

A side-by-side comparison of solar eclipse types. The left image shows a total eclipse with a dark lunar silhouette and an extensive white solar corona. The right image shows an annular eclipse with a bright ring of fire around the Moon.

Color-enhanced photograph of a barred spiral galaxy. The image shows a warped disk with bright blue regions of active star formation. Reddish-brown areas indicate dense interstellar dust lanes, all set against a dark background.

A sharp, false-color image from the Chandra Observatory. The view shows a cool giant star and its white dwarf companion as two distinct, glowing X-ray sources. The colors represent different energy levels in the interacting binary system.

A photograph of a modular space station floating above white Earth clouds. The station features a complex, insect-like appearance with numerous solar panels and antennas. The lighting is bright and direct, highlighting the metallic textures of the modules.

A cosmic visualization of a proto-supercluster. Massive galaxies are depicted as bright white spots, while regions containing a large number of smaller galaxies are shaded in vibrant blue. The structure appears as an enormous, textured conglomeration against dark space.

Hubble Space Telescope image of two overlapping spiral galaxies. The foreground galaxy is viewed face-on with bright blue star clusters. Dark, swirling dust lanes from the foreground galaxy are seen in silhouette against the glow of the background galaxy.

A telescope view of a star-forming region. The image features red glowing emission nebulas, blue reflection nebulas of dust, and dark, opaque absorption nebulas. The scene is a complex and colorful morass of gas, dust, and newborn stars.

A wide field of stars featuring a comet with a fuzzy, blue-tinted tail. In the upper left, an edge-on lenticular galaxy appears as a narrow gash of light, while an elliptical galaxy appears football-shaped beside it.

An all-sky map of cosmic radiation. One side of the map appears blueshifted and hotter (represented in blue), while the opposite side appears redshifted and colder (represented in red). The image shows a smooth gradient across a spherical projection.

A false-color composite image of the Sombrero Galaxy. The infrared glow of a dark dust ring is shown in bright red, superposed on an optical light image showing a glowing central bulb and a thin disk against a dark background.

A high-resolution color-enhanced image of a moon's surface. The landscape is marked by vibrant yellow and orange sulfur compounds. Darker regions of silicate rock are visible, and the surface appears rugged and volcanic with features as small as three kilometers.

A telescope view of a bright nebula. The image features a general red glow from hydrogen gas and dark filaments of dense dust. A bright open cluster of stars is visible within the textured, colorful gas clouds.

A photograph of red light pillars hovering above a bay. The vertical lines of light reflect from falling ice crystals. The scene includes a dark horizon and water, with the red pillars standing out sharply against the dim background.

A photograph from space showing a space station and a bright crescent moon above the Earth's limb. Thick white storm clouds are visible in the blue atmosphere. The space station appears as a spindly, metallic silhouette.

A telescopic view of a slender crescent Moon. An airliner is captured flying in front of the sunlit crescent. The jet's contrails reflect a strong reddish light from the setting sun against a darkening blue sky.

A photograph of a large, tumbling asteroid. Exaggerated color variations highlight differences in reflectivity and surface structure. The irregular rock appears grey with subtle patches of blue and brown against a black background.

Hubble Space Telescope image of an unusual elliptical galaxy. The galaxy is surrounded by multiple diffuse, concentric shells of stars. Embedded in the shells are massive globular clusters, and a spiral galaxy is visible on the far left.

Black and white surface maps of two celestial bodies. The maps show pixelated, rectangular artifacts and depict varying light and dark regions on the surfaces. One map represents a face with diverse albedo features.

A sharp telescopic view of a globular star cluster. The image shows an immense swarm of over 100,000 stars packed into a dense central concentration. Foreground stars appear as spiky points of light over the distant, glowing cluster.

A photograph of a bright comet and a crescent moon in a twilight sky. The comet easily competes with the light-polluted sky, appearing as a glowing streak with a distinct tail near the over-exposed moon.
A false-color ultraviolet image of Earth taken from the Moon. The side facing the Sun reflects bright UV light, while the night side shows glowing bands of UV emission from auroras near the poles.
A high-resolution adaptive-optic image showing a brown dwarf as a bright white dot. A much fainter red object, representing a planet, is visible at a small separation against the black background.

A negative image highlighting an optical transient labeled OT. The transient appears as a dark spot against a light background, with other common comparison stars designated by letters. The image shows a field of point sources.
A HiRISE camera image of the Martian surface. A white box marks a 47-meter-wide area on the rusty red, dusty soil. Within the box, a small, dark blip represents a silent rover.

A color-enhanced mosaic from the Martian surface. A small robot rover is seen analyzing a grey rock. The foreground features part of a landing station, and a distant hill is visible on the horizon under an orange sky.

A Hubble Space Telescope image of a large, face-on spiral galaxy. The image shows exquisite detail in the spiral arms and dust lanes. An impressive array of distant background galaxies is strewn across the field.

A wide night panorama following the arch of the Milky Way. The scene includes a boardwalk leading through wetlands. Bright planets and summer/winter constellations are visible, with the Andromeda galaxy near the top of the frame.
A telescope view of Hind's Crimson Star. The star appears as a shocking, exceptionally deep shade of red, described as looking like a drop of blood against the black void of space.
A photograph of a comet with a long, graceful tail. Faint stars shine through the translucent tail against a dark sky. The comet's head appears as a bright, glowing point.
A sharp image of the First Quarter Moon. Shadows and light along the terminator line create shapes resembling letters, including a distinct 'V' near the center and 'L' and 'E' near the bottom.
An artist's impression of a spacecraft encountering a comet. The image shows the metallic probe approaching the textured, icy nucleus of the comet against a dark, starless background.

A false-color satellite image showing relative water temperatures in the Equatorial Pacific. Blue indicates relatively cool water, while warmer areas appear in red and yellow, creating a textured map of the ocean surface.

A composite image of a dwarf galaxy. In visible light, it appears as a yellow smudge. In a specific radio band, a blue spiral structure appears, representing neutral hydrogen atoms extending far beyond the visible center.
A 360-degree near-true-color panorama from Mars. The image shows Husband Hill in the distance, rover tracks in the red soil, and a rocky, dusty landscape under a hazy sky.

A single image capturing a streaking meteor, a comet with a long horizontal dust tail, and a seagull-shaped emission nebula. The composition combines long exposures to reveal faint, colorful celestial elements.
A computer-animated frame depicting two neutron stars. The stars are shown as two bright, glowing spheres spiraling inward toward each other against a dark background, just before a collision.
A composite image of the Cat's Eye Nebula. The central region features haunting symmetries, surrounded by an enormous but extremely faint halo of gaseous material with filamentary textures.

A telescopic composite image following Saturn's retrograde motion. The planet is shown as a series of bright points against a starry background, passing near the central Milky Way and colorful nebulas.

A reflection nebula image showing fine, blue-tinted dust reflecting the light of nearby stars. The nebula complex, IC 4592, takes on the shape of a horse's head. Another blue nebula is visible to the right.

A false-color X-ray composite of the Orion Nebula region. The image is centered on bright stars of the Trapezium cluster, appearing as concentrated points of high-energy emission against a dark background.

A photograph of a metallic, saucer-shaped capsule that crash-landed in a desert. The saucer is partially embedded in the sand, with its internal components exposed. Helicopters are visible in the background sky.

A photograph of Jupiter's moon Ganymede. The image shows two old craters with distinct dark floors located in a relatively bright, textured region known as Memphis Facula. Other smaller craters are scattered nearby.

A 360-degree stereographic projection from the surface of Titan. The wide-angle view shows bright, high ground laced with drainage channels and dark, dry lakebeds. Bright ridges of ice gravel are also visible.
A photograph of northern lights over a lake. Green and red auroral rays extend into the sky, reflecting on the water. Bright planet Mars is visible above the horizon near the center.
Telescope image of a prominent spiral galaxy. The view shows a large, face-on spiral with blue star clusters and pinkish regions of star formation against a dark sky.
An artist's vision of a city-sized neutron star. The star is centered in a disk of hot plasma, emitting powerful particle beams and pulses of light as it rotates rapidly.
A classic emission nebula known as the California Nebula. The image features a prominent red glow from hydrogen atoms. The shape of the nebula echoes the outline of the state of California.
A night skyscape featuring a greenish airglow visible as eerie, diffuse waves across the sky. The foreground shows the Canadian Rockies and the Big Dipper constellation above the mountain range.

Telescopic view of swept-back, comet-shaped clouds. One cloud is dominated by red emission light, while the other shows a blue tint from reflected starlight. The clouds appear ghostly and filamentary.
A photograph of a man in a pressure suit sitting in a cramped space capsule. The interior features numerous mechanical dials and switches, highlighting the industrial texture of early space hardware.
A composite image of multiple meteor streaks. The streaks all connect to a single radiant point near the constellation Orion, seen over a dark volcano silhouette and a parked car.
A wide-field view showing dark nebulae snaking across a star field. The central S-shape of the Snake Nebula is visible in cosmic silhouette against the rich background of the Milky Way.
A photograph from space showing the Hawaiian Island archipelago. The Earth's curved limb and white clouds are visible in the background against the dark void. The volcanic peaks stand out clearly.
A stunning image of a young crescent Moon near the western horizon. The dark part of the lunar disk glows with Earthshine. Silhouette radio telescope dishes are visible in the foreground.
A photograph of a huge red supergiant star. The star is surrounded by a glowing nebula of gas it has expelled, appearing as a hazy, luminous cloud around a bright center.
A representative-color picture of a young star cluster and nursery. The image shows bright stars ejecting matter to sculpt beautiful, complex gas structures and a dark knot of dust.
The provided text is a metadata footer for the Astronomy Picture of the Day website and does not contain a visual description of an image.
A false-color infrared image of Titan showing a persistent bright spot near the upper edge. The spot is 500 kilometers wide and stands out against the thick, hazy atmosphere of the moon.
A star field showing swirls of gas and dust. The image features red glowing emission nebulas with bright filaments, a small blue reflection nebula, and swaths of thick, dark absorption nebulas.
A wide view of the Trifid Nebula showing three types of nebulas: red emission, blue reflection, and dark absorption lanes. Light-year long pillars and jets are visible below the center.
A picture showing an impact site on Jupiter's cloud-tops. The impact appears as a dark outer ring, roughly the size of Earth, against the gas giant's banded atmospheric background.
High-energy X-ray and gamma-ray images of the Galactic center. The false-color view reveals clusters of bright sources releasing enormous energy against a dark, textured background.
A telescopic view of a comet with a greenish spherical coma, about half the size of a full moon. A very faint tail and distant background galaxies are visible.
A telescopic image of the Cave Nebula using the Hubble Palette (hydrogen, oxygen, sulfur). The scene features a bright rim of ionized gas and textured, colorful clouds along the Milky Way.
An infrared skyview of the Orion region in red, green, and blue. A large, bright ring-shaped supernova remnant is prominent, and gas clouds in Orion's sword glow in yellow.
A snapshot showing sunlit exhaust plumes from a rocket's first stage. The reddish-orange plumes are seen from a beach, with a dog and people in the foreground looking skyward.
A telescope image of the Lagoon Nebula. The view shows hot gas, an open cluster of stars, and a band of dust. Many dark, dust-laden globules are scattered throughout.
A synthetic color image swath of a Martian volcanic region. North is up, showing dome-shaped volcanoes and a shield volcano with a broad summit basin or caldera.
A digitally foreshortened image mosaic showing waves in Saturn's rings. The waves appear as ripples in the ring particles, caused by the gravitational perturbation of a small orbiting moon.

A false-color digitally reconstructed image of Saturn's rings. Purple indicates regions with large particles, while green shows areas with small particles. The white center indicates high ring density.
An aerial view from space showing rugged, snow-covered Himalayan mountain peaks. The horizon shows a high point at the left and the southern Tibetan Plateau in the foreground.
A night skyscape featuring a young crescent Moon with strong Earthshine, joined by a bright planet. A mother and daughter are silhouetted on a hill in the foreground.
A composite of Hubble Space Telescope images showing comet fragments as a string of pearls. The pieces are strung out along the comet's orbital path against a black background.
An artist's depiction showing a loose filament of stars and gas entangling the Milky Way. The stream appears as a jumble of glowing clumps and wispy structures in space.
A telescope image of the Trifid Nebula. The view features red-glowing gas, dark dust filaments, and a blue reflection nebula lit by bright young stars.
A time-lapse sequence showing dark marks on Jupiter's surface resulting from a comet impact. The dark marks gradually fade against the planet's banded gas giant atmosphere.
A photograph of a spectacular aurora with vivid green and purple colors. The light display features a high degree of detail and is framed by eerie birch trees in the foreground.
A telescope image of the Beehive open cluster. The cluster features hundreds of bright blue stars visible against a dark background, once mistaken for a nebula.
A photograph of a line of 13 closely spaced craters on a moon's surface. The craters cut across a sharp boundary between dark and light terrain.
A photograph of a gibbous Moon with an airplane appearing to fly past it in the foreground. The scene is set in a dark night sky.
A Cassini spacecraft image showing a light-colored spot on the surface of Saturn's moon Rhea. The spot appears to be a crater with bright material splashed onto the darker surface.
A telescope image of the Seahorse Nebula seen in silhouette. The dusty, obscuring clouds appear dark against a rich, luminous background of stars.
An artist's vision of two dense white dwarf stars spiraling closer together. The stars are depicted as glowing orbs generating gravity waves in a death spiral.
A color-enhanced image of Jupiter's clouds. Light clouds swirl around reddish regions, and the image highlights how lighter clouds typically sit higher than darker ones.
A false-color infrared image of the Horsehead Nebula region. The interstellar infrared glow engulfs much of the horse's head, with a bright newborn star at the top.
A digitally created mosaic panorama of the Milky Way's disk. Visible are bright stars, dark dust lanes, red emission nebulae, blue reflection nebulae, and star clusters.
A telescope image of a planetary nebula with a very apparent annular ring-like structure. The nebula surrounds a central condense point in space.
A digitally sharpened telescope image of the Dumbbell Nebula in three colors. The planetary nebula features a bipolar structure with gaseous outer envelopes being expelled.
A photograph of a bright, colorful meteor flashing through predawn skies above a sea of clouds. The meteor trail points back toward a shower's radiant.
A photograph of an astronaut on a spacewalk, holding a compressed gas maneuver gun. He is falling freely in low earth orbit alongside his capsule.
A telescope photograph of a meteor outburst. Multiple streaks of light are seen originating from a single point in the night sky.
An infrared Spitzer Space Telescope image of dust pillars. The fantastic pillars of glowing dust and gas point suggestively toward a massive star's position off-frame.
A false-colored image mosaic of the Martian moon Phobos. The larger moon is a cratered, asteroid-like object with unusual long grooves on its surface.
An orbiting satellite image showing hot gas dancing across the Sun's surface. Blue represents hundreds of thousands of Kelvin, while red represents extreme temperatures in the millions.
A digitally stitched panorama from the Moon. An astronaut examines a boulder in front of a lunar summit, with a diverse lunar terrain visible in the background.
A photograph of a solar-powered aircraft flying above clouds. The aircraft features very long, thin wings that convert sunlight into power for remote-controlled flight.
A Cassini spacecraft image showing bright Enceladus in the background, contrasting with darker foreground rings of Saturn. The moon appears clean and reflective.
A Mars Global Surveyor close-up showing a sea of sand dunes at the north pole. The dunes are covered with scattered white patches of frost.
The first image taken by InSight on Mars. The view shows a dusty lens cap, a lander footpad, and a rusty red horizon dividing land and sky.
An infrared image of a domed feature on Titan, suspected to be an ice volcano. The circular feature is roughly thirty kilometers in diameter.
A digital photograph from the International Space Station showing a diffuse terminator line. Cloud tops reflect reddened sunlight filtered through the dusty troposphere.
A telescopic view showing a pair of spiral galaxies. One has dramatic dust lanes and warped spiral arms, indicating gravitational interaction with its companion.
A Hubble Space Telescope close-up of a supernova remnant. The image shows surviving dense knots of dust and gas being compressed into new structures.
A photograph from space showing a space station and a bright crescent moon above the Earth's limb. White storm clouds are visible in the blue atmosphere.
A Hubble Space Telescope image of a giant dust pillar in reassigned colors. The statuesque pillar is evaporating under powerful starlight, appearing like a mythical beast.
A wide-field photograph showing a comet with a faint tail sharing the stage with the central band of the Milky Way and bright orange stars.
A telescopic close-up showing dark dust clouds outlined by bright ridges of glowing gas. The image appears mostly red due to hydrogen gas emission.
A photograph of Venus as a brilliant 'star' shining low in the west shortly after sunset, reflected in a harbor filled with moored boats.
A composite image of a rocket launch between mountains. The frame shows the rocket lifting off, with a separate background capturing the surrounding landscape.
A telescope image of a quasar. The object appears as a bright, point-like energy source far across the universe, possibly magnified by a gravitational lens.
A representative-color image of a butterfly-shaped planetary nebula. The image shows two stars orbiting inside a gaseous disk with expelled bipolar wings.
A photograph of a colossal globular star cluster. The swarm of over 100,000 stars is packed into a dense cluster spanning 150 light years.
A complex composite image showing an eruption of material from the solar limb. The ultraviolet Sun is at the center, with expanding clouds of material.
A wide-field Hubble palette image showing dark shapes with bright edges. The emission nebula features sulfur, hydrogen, and oxygen in red, green, and blue hues.
A false-color Hubble Space Telescope image of a galaxy cluster. Each fuzzy spot represents a galaxy similar in mass to our own Milky Way.
A composite of images tracing the retrograde motion of Mars. The red planet appears to trace a loop against the background of stars.
A photograph of a bright blue star, the Summer Triangle, and a comet high above the horizon during a clear evening.
A reprocessed Hubble Space Telescope image showing long funnel-shaped clouds in a nebula. The activity is driven by energetic starlight bombardment of dusty molecular clouds.
A video camera frame showing an annular solar eclipse. A solar ring is visible around the dark disk of the Moon.
A cosmic view showing an edge-on spiral galaxy and a face-on spiral galaxy together. The field includes colorful foreground stars and background galaxies.
An artist's drawing of a terrestrial-like planet as seen from a hypothetical moon. The planet is depicted as a rocky world orbiting an M-dwarf star.
A composite X-ray, optical, and infrared light image of a supernova remnant. The infrared portion highlights light echoes heating up distant ambient dust.
A composite Vermeer-style image showing two editors surrounded by astronomical submissions and email icons, celebrating an anniversary of the website.
A seasonal graphic showing highlights of the northern hemisphere sky. Events fan out like a clock face centered on a figure with a telescope.
A 30-second long exposure recording a shimmering auroral glow and a bright fireball meteor trail pointing back toward a constellation.
A photograph of a white tornado funnel descending from dark clouds, appearing to end over a colorful rainbow in a sunlit landscape.
A sharp composite image of the Pacman Nebula made through narrow-band filters. It shows dusty columns and Bok globules synthesized in red, green, and blue.
A photograph of a reddened crescent Moon about to sink under the horizon, with brilliant Venus and Jupiter shining in the sky above the sea.
A telescopic mosaic of a supernova remnant. The ghost-like blue smoke ring is shown using filters for sulfur, hydrogen, and oxygen in red, green, and blue.
A grand design spiral galaxy with sprawling arms and a small nucleus. The nucleus is surrounded by a chain of hot giant clouds of ionized hydrogen.
A color image of the Horsehead Nebula. The dark dust silhouette is seen against a glowing red emission nebula, with a blue reflection nebula at the lower left.
A composite X-ray and optical image of the Cheshire Cat galaxy group. Two elliptical galaxies are framed by arcs of lensed light with a purple X-ray glow.
A radio telescope image covering a 4x4 degree region of the galactic center. The view features arcs, threads, and filaments around a bright central object.
A daytime image from Budapest showing the Moon and Venus in similar crescent phases. The two celestial bodies share a small portion of the bright sky.
A Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter image showing dark brown streaks on melting pinkish sand dunes. The streaks appear to cascade down the dunes from the frost-covered interior.
A false-color telescopic view of the Jellyfish Nebula. The arcing ridge of emission features dangling tentacles, mapped in oxygen (blue), hydrogen (green), and sulfur (red).
A Hubble Space Telescope image of spiral galaxy NGC 3521. The view highlights patchy, irregular spiral arms laced with dust and clusters of young blue stars.
A photograph showing the arch of the southern Milky Way over a rainforest and waterfall. Bright stars and neighboring galaxies are visible in the star-filled sky.
A spectacular view of the Tarantula Nebula composed with narrowband filter data. It shows ionized hydrogen emission, spidery filaments, and bubble-shaped clouds.
A night photograph of ancient figures painted on canyon walls. The star-filled Milky Way galaxy is visible in the dark sky background behind the desert landscape.
A detailed image of the Tarantula Nebula star-forming region. Red and pink gas indicates a massive emission nebula, with a bright knot of massive stars at the center.
A telescopic view of elliptical galaxy M87. The giant egg-shaped galaxy features a high-energy jet of particles emerging from its central region.
A Cassini spacecraft image showing moon Enceladus above Saturn's rings. The moon appears as a bright crescent, with south polar geysers visible venting into space.
A telescope view of two merging galaxies joined by a cosmic bridge of stars and gas. One galaxy is a face-on spiral with blue clusters.
A time series of nine telescopic snapshots showing a lunar crescent passing in front of Venus in a clear blue daytime sky.
A microscopic photograph showing a ball slightly over one-tenth of a millimeter moving toward a smooth plate, providing evidence of vacuum energy fluctuations.
A false-color view of Ceres combining near-infrared and visible light. The dramatic image reveals mysterious bright salt spots inside a dark impact crater.
A photograph of a spectacular aurora over black sand beaches and sea stacks. Bright planet Jupiter and constellations are visible in the colorful night sky.
A solar disk image showing the International Space Station and Space Shuttle Atlantis in silhouette. The two spacefaring vessels appear as dark patches on the Sun.
A composite of short and long exposures showing a crescent Moon, brilliant Venus, and Comet Catalina with two distinct tails in the predawn sky.
A photograph of Comet Catalina sporting both dust and ion tails. The comet appears as a green glow with diverging tails against a starry morning sky.
A photograph showing the Moon and Venus as a close pair above a calm lake. Sunset colors fade behind a treeline, and Earthshine illuminates the Moon.
An extreme ultraviolet image from the Solar Dynamics Observatory. A dark filament is suspended by magnetic fields above a solar active region near the Sun's edge.
A sharp color image of the Great Globular Cluster in Hercules. The cluster's dense core features hundreds of thousands of yellowish and blue giant stars.
A photograph showing tire tracks crossing a featureless Martian desert, emanating from the distant horizon under a hazy sky.
A vertical panorama capturing a comet's greenish coma in a starry sky above the bell tower of a Romanesque church.
A long-exposure photograph of the Rho Ophiuchi molecular cloud. The image features red emission nebulas, light and dark brown dust lanes, and blue reflection nebulas.
A composite sequence of nine exposures showing a lunar corona, star trails, and a colorful trail from the space shuttle docked with the space station.
A blended composite image of 30 exposures showing Geminid meteors raining down over a mountain observatory in the dark Atacama Desert.
Hard X-ray detected supermassive black holes circled in various merging galaxy systems. The optical backgrounds show textured, interacting galactic bodies.
An infrared image of the Galactic Center showing nearly one million stars. A dark diagonal dust lane cuts across the star-rich plane of the Milky Way.
A photograph of a fire rainbow or circumhorizon arc. The colorful arc is created by ice crystals in high cirrus clouds refracting sunlight.
An infrared WISE telescope image of the Heart and Soul Nebulas. The view shows vast bubbles created by newly formed stars within massive forming regions.
A Cassini spacecraft image showing Saturn moon Rhea passing Epimetheus. Saturn's featureless green cloud layers and complex ring system provide the background.
A high-resolution image of Pluto showing ice mountains composed of water ice. Textured ice pits and segmented plains of nitrogen ice are also visible.
A photograph showing the Horsehead Nebula as a dark indentation, the orange-tinged Flame Nebula, and blue reflection nebulas against a starry background.
A false-color infrared image of Jupiter from SOFIA. The image reveals a bright white stripe where clouds are transparent to infrared light.
A photograph of a meteor streaking over an observatory. The meteor appears to swagger or take a twisting path several minutes of arc wide.
An Orion-centered panorama over an icy river. The frigid water reflects the starry sky and village lights, with ice streaks visible in the long exposures.
A panoramic color image of the Whale galaxy viewed edge-on. Dark dust clouds and bright blue star clusters highlight the galaxy's distorted wedge shape.
A color composite Hubble image of active galaxy NGC 1275. The view shows galactic debris and 20,000-light-year-long filaments of glowing gas.
A sharp image of Thor's Helmet nebula. The filamentary structure features a blue-green color from oxygen emission and wing-like appendages from a central star.
A photograph from the International Space Station showing a red sprite lightning phenomenon. The red flash is visible above a typical white lightning strike.
A shallow-focus image rendering pine needles sharp while blurring the distant stars of Scorpius into colorful disks. Antares and Saturn are visible as blurry orbs.
A composite image showing Geminid meteors flowing out from a radiant point in the sky above a mountain observatory.
An image showing a comet with an impressive green coma and a long ion tail set against a field of distant star trails.
A detailed Hydrogen Alpha image of the Sun's surface. The false-color view shows prominences, active areas marked by dark plages, and limb darkening.
A photograph of a remote-controlled robot rover on the lunar Sea of Rains. The robot features a metallic, mechanical robot form with various instruments.
A telescopic image showing the Soap Bubble and Crescent nebulas. The image captures glowing gaseous envelopes shed by stars in star fields along the Milky Way.
A deep telescopic view showing emission regions IC 405 and IC 410. The scene includes glowing hydrogen gas, tadpole-shaped clouds, and star clusters.
A digitally warped little planet projection covering 360x180 degrees. The mosaic shows concentric star trails and a hilltop lookout tower construction.
A starry skyscape showing Regulus and Mars in a colorful pairing. The blue star and red planet contrast was enhanced through a diffusion filter.
A telescope image of the Fox Fur Nebula. The view shows textured red and black dust mixed with blue reflection regions from a bright star.
A telescope image showing brown filaments of dust surrounding the glowing red gas of the Orion Nebula. Stars are embedded within the picturesque textures.
A pixelated Vermeer composite image made using over 5,000 small Astronomy Picture of the Day images as digital pixels.
A nightscape capturing shimmering reddish curtains of aurora australis over a silhouetted tree. The southern Milky Way and satellite galaxies are also visible.
A space-themed rendition of Van Gogh's Starry Night, acting as a collage for various astronomical objects including nebulas, comets, and galaxies.
A composite image of two green auroral rings over a glacial lake. The Milky Way and Andromeda galaxy are visible in the background.
A telescopic image of a comet showing a long ion tail, a short dust tail, and a greenish coma against a rich star field.
A red/blue stereo view of an asteroid. The 3D image reveals boulders strewn across a rough surface and a lack of craters.
A photograph from the Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter showing the Earth setting over a lunar edge. The Earth appears as a blue marble.
A predawn telescopic mosaic showing two comets and a bright meteor trail slashing across the sky between them.
A newly processed panorama of the Lagoon Nebula. The image displays enhanced colors from hydrogen (brown), sulfur (red), and oxygen (blue).
A series of digitally stacked images showing the retrograde loop of Mars against the background stars of the night sky.
A telescope image of the nebula surrounding a massive star. Two distinct lobes, a hot central region, and strange radial streaks are visible.
A Hubble Space Telescope image of the Red Rectangle nebula. The view shows a bipolar X-shape with distinct rung-like structures.
A Hubble Space Telescope image showing gravity-bent light as long faint arcs among a cluster of galaxies acting as a lens.
A color composite image of M51 Whirlpool Galaxy. Reddish hydrogen emission regions trace intense star formation along the galaxy's bright spiral arms.
A Hubble Space Telescope image of Herbig-Haro 24. Two cosmic jets beam outward like a double-bladed lightsaber from a central protostar.
A telescope image of the Whale Galaxy featuring tidal star streams. These faint extended features appear as remnants of a disrupted dwarf satellite.
A telescopic composite following a comet's progress. Its faint coma and tails are viewed against a colorful background of stars over several months.
A telescopic panorama of Corona Australis featuring bluish reflection nebulae, dark dust clouds blocking background stars, and a magnificent globular star cluster.
A tripod-mounted stack of 240 exposures showing colorful star trails in concentric arcs over the north face of Mount Everest illuminated by moonlight.
A photograph of a sunrise at Stonehenge involving fog, trees, and clouds. The Sun rises over the ancient stone arrangement.
