Night panoramic skyscape featuring dozens of bright, straight meteor trails radiating across a dark star field. In the foreground, an array of white parabolic radio telescope dishes is silhouetted against a deep blue and black sky over a flat landscape.

High-contrast photograph showing the black silhouette of a penguin looking upward. The background features the shimmering, wispy white light of a solar corona during an eclipse, set against a dark sky with soft, diffused textures.

Scientific illustration of a black hole system. A dark central void is surrounded by a swirling, glowing accretion disk of orange and yellow gas. Warped, translucent bands of light represent gravitational effects against a star-filled space background.

Two telescopic views of a moon's surface. The larger image features a prominent, irregular black patch on a yellow and orange volcanic landscape. An inset frame shows the same region previously without the dark spot, highlighting high-contrast surface changes.

Telescopic image of a compact galaxy group. Four galaxies have a textured, yellowish cast with distorted loops and tidal tails. A fifth, larger galaxy appears brilliant blue with distinct spiral arms, all set against a deep black void.

False-color global map of the Pacific Ocean. Sea surface heights are color-coded, with a massive, textured white region indicating unusually high levels near the equator. The landmasses are shown in dark outlines against the vibrant blue and white water.

High-resolution aerial view of a Martian canyon. The image features sharp, sheer mountain cliffs with extensive, fine-grained horizontal layering. Chiaroscuro lighting creates deep, black shadows against the craggy, light-colored triangular rock faces.

Wide-field telescopic view of a gumdrop-shaped irregular galaxy. The structure is filled with scattered young blue star clusters and a hazy white glow. Bright, spiky foreground stars in yellow and white are dotted across the star-filled field.

Aerial photograph of a large, circular impact crater in a flat desert. The crater features a raised, jagged rim and a deep, shadowed bowl. The surrounding landscape is a textured, light-brown expanse under bright, direct sunlight.

Near-infrared telescopic mosaics of Uranus. The planet is color-coded with blue deeper layers and reddish-tinged high clouds. A thin, bright ring system is visible, along with eight small, distinct points of light representing moons moving over time.

Telescope image of a star nursery. A bright star at the bottom features prominent, sharp X-shaped diffraction spikes. Near the center, a small, half-circled point of light is embedded within billowy clouds of glowing gas and dark dust.

Mosaic family portrait of four small, grey, potato-shaped moons. The moons have irregular, non-spherical shapes and heavily cratered, lumpy textures. They are arranged in a horizontal line against a solid black background, scaled to their relative sizes.

False-color Hubble image of a star cluster. Numerous bright stars are surrounded by gigantic, glowing globs of gas and dust. Some structures appear as teardrop shapes pointing away from a central cluster of bright, massive stars.

Computer simulation frame showing a high-energy jet. A narrow, bright beam of white and blue energy rams through a textured, multicolored background of red and yellow gas clouds, creating complex mixing and swirling patterns.

Infrared mosaic of Jupiter featuring high-altitude, bright white cloud bands against a dark blue background. A small, bright point of light represents an inner moon positioned within a very faint, edge-on ring cutting across the gas giant's center.

Night photograph capturing a bright comet and a large spiral galaxy together. The comet features a fanned-out white and blue tail. The scene is set in a star-filled sky, recorded with a soft, diffused glow from long-exposure lighting.

Ultraviolet SOHO image of the Sun. A massive, majestic arch of glowing plasma rises from the solar limb. The fiery prominence features an intricate, thread-like texture, set against a black background of space.

False-color near-infrared image of a circumstellar disk. A central bright source is blocked, revealing a warped, glowing inner region and a broad, dusty outer disk. The textures are hazy and billowy in shades of blue and white.
Voyager 2 photograph of Uranus. The planet appears as a smooth, featureless pale blue sphere with a slight gradient in brightness across its curved surface, set against a pitch-black background.

Artist's illustration of a variable star system. Numerous narrow, brilliant beams of ultraviolet light radiate from a chaotic central star surrounded by an energized, textured cloud of glowing pink and blue gas.

Gallery of Hubble Space Telescope portraits. Each panel shows a bright, star-like object with sharp diffraction spikes. The central and right columns feature distorted, merging, and clumpy galaxy textures associated with the bright central sources.

Grainy photograph of cloud decks on Jupiter. Bright, concentrated flashes of light illuminate textured, white and grey cloud layers from within. The scene is dimly lit, emphasizing the high contrast of the electrical discharges.

Night photograph featuring a bright comet with a massive fanned tail over a silhouetted landscape. The foreground is momentarily illuminated by a flashlight, revealing rocky textures beneath a star-filled sky.

High-resolution image of terrain on Ganymede. The surface features a unique half-circle shape cut by nearly parallel curved ridges. A dense, straight chain of small impact craters crosses the top of the lumpy, grey landscape.
Black-and-white portrait photograph of a man with a focused expression. He is wearing a dark flight suit, positioned in front of the metallic structural elements of a small airplane.

Photograph of an ancient stone circle. Large, grey, weathered rectangular boulders are arranged in a ring on a green grassy field. The scene is captured under a bright sky, emphasizing the heavy, textured mass of the megaliths.

Space photograph featuring a white, spherical robotic camera floating in microgravity. The ball has a metallic and plastic texture with several small lens openings, positioned against the dark, distant curve of the Earth's horizon.

Deep Hubble Space Telescope field where every bright object is a galaxy. The frame is densely packed with numerous spiral galaxies showing winding arms and small, glowing elliptical galaxies against a black void.

Martian surface image showing a light-colored depression. Dark, geometric lines criss-cross the floor, resembling a dried-up, cracked lake bed. The surrounding terrain is a mix of tan soil and fine, dusty textures.

Four-frame time-lapse sequence of radio telescope images. Each frame shows bright, false-color bubbles of plasma in shades of red and yellow, appearing to move and expand outward from a central point over several days.

Artist's vision of a double star system. A bright, rapidly rotating massive star is surrounded by a glowing, flattened disk of gas. A smaller, intensely hot core orbits nearby against a star-rich background.

Telescope view of the Trifid Nebula. Three dark, opaque dust lanes divide a vibrant red emission region. Adjacent is a soft blue reflection nebula, with the entire complex set against a rich field of sharp background stars.

Dramatic telescopic image of two overlapping galaxies. An edge-on spiral galaxy with dark dust lanes sits in the foreground, partially obscuring a large, rounded white elliptical galaxy in the background.

Astronomical sky chart on a blue background. The graphic shows the positions of the Moon and five planets along a curved line representing the ecliptic plane, with labeled constellations and star points.

Telescope photograph featuring a brilliant white star with prominent diffraction spikes. A graceful, arcing bow wave of compressed gas is visible nearby, appearing as a faint, glowing blue curve against a dark, grainy background.

Wide-field photograph of the Orion constellation. The image features a giant, textured gas cloud complex in shades of red and pink, including a dark horse-head silhouette and three bright stars forming a central belt.

Hubble Space Telescope image of the Blinking Eye Nebula. A bright central star is centered within a circular, blue-green gas shell. Two mysterious red spots are positioned on either side of the gaseous structure.

Butterfly-shaped planetary nebula shown in representative colors. Symmetrical, translucent wings of gas and dust extend from a central point containing two stars. The texture is wispy and billowy in shades of blue and white.

Multi-wavelength composite image. Red represents X-ray emission from hot gas, green shows ionized hydrogen, and blue highlights ultraviolet radiation from stars. The scene is a textured explosion of colorful gas and bright star points.

Night landscape showing a bright comet with two distinct tails over a snowy mountain range. The foreground features textured white snow illuminated by moonlight, with the comet positioned above a dark, silhouetted ridge.

Photograph of two massive, white hexagonal telescope buildings on a volcanic peak. The background features another distant volcanic cone and a soft, hazy sky. The structures have a sharp, industrial, geometric appearance.
Historical photograph of a man in a khaki hat and suit standing on the rim of a massive desert crater. He is looking out over the textured, greyish-tan impact basin under bright, direct sunlight.

Enhanced-color image of a moon's surface. The landscape features disconnected islands of white and blue ice that have rafted to new positions. The terrain is highly textured with ridges, cracks, and icy dust.
Telescope image of the Saturn Nebula. The structure features a barrel-shaped green gas shell with red, wing-like tips at the ends. The texture is smooth and gaseous, set against a dark background.

Hubble Space Telescope image of a symmetric, spiral-shaped planetary nebula. The structure features multiple bright blobs of gas in a balanced, geometric arrangement around a central white dwarf star against a black background.
Telescope view of the Keyhole Nebula. The image features a bright red and pink emission nebula with a distinct, oddly-shaped dark indentation of dust. The textures are billowy and highly structured.

Infrared all-sky image from the COBE satellite. A thin, horizontal band of light represents the galactic plane. Stars appear as white pinpoints, while dense interstellar dust is shown in a vibrant red glow.

Hubble Space Telescope image showing a dense swarm of stars. Hot stars are colored blue, while cooler stars appear reddish-orange. The pinpoints of light are incredibly concentrated toward the center, creating a glowing stellar core.
Hubble Space Telescope image of a galaxy cluster acting as a lens. Numerous bright yellow galaxies are surrounded by dozens of faint, blue, stretched-out arcs of light against a dark background.
Three panels showing distant supernovae in galaxies. Each frame features a small, bright point of light that appears and then fades within a faint, fuzzy galactic smudge against a grainy dark field.

Sharp Hubble image of an overlapping galaxy pair. A foreground spiral galaxy with dark dust lanes in its arms is backlit by a bright, rounded elliptical galaxy, revealing textures of the interstellar dust.

False-color global comparison of Earth. Two globes show relative warm water levels in the Pacific Ocean. High levels are indicated in vibrant red and white, creating a textured map of thermal anomalies.
Color-coded cloud map of Jupiter. White clouds are high and thick, light blue are high and thin, and reddish clouds are low. The edge of a massive red storm appears blue in this visualization.

Telescopic image of the Red Spider Nebula. The two-lobed, symmetric structure features hot gas flowing along its walls. Atoms caught in colliding shocks radiate light, creating an intricate, web-like texture.

False-color ultraviolet image of Saturn. Pole-encircling rings of bright white and red aurora tower above the planet's dark, banded cloud tops. The lighting highlights magnetic footprints at the poles.
Wide-angle photograph from the outer Solar System. The Earth appears as a single, tiny, faint blue dot in the center of the frame, set against a dark void with faint diagonal streaks of light.

Overhead satellite photograph of a massive circular geologic feature in the desert. The structure features concentric rings of layered sedimentary rock, resembling a giant blue and tan bullseye in the sand.

False-color image of the Moon's nearside with exaggerated saturation. Blue hues reveal titanium-rich areas, while orange and purple show iron-poor regions. White lines radiate from a prominent ray-crater at the bottom.
Telescopic skyscape featuring a vibrant red emission nebula on the left and a soft blue reflection nebula on the right. A bright star cluster is embedded within the textured, colorful gas clouds.
Two false-color ultraviolet close-ups of Jupiter's poles. Bright white and blue auroral rings and comet-like hot spots are visible above the planet's dull brown limb, set against a black background.
Sequence of video-camera frames showing bright, momentary reflections of sunlight from solar panels. The points of light move across a background of hazy white clouds and distant star points.

Bipolar planetary nebula featuring two large, symmetric bubbles of hot gas. The expansion creates a supersonic shock-wave boundary. Colors are assigned by energy, showing vibrant shades of blue, green, and red.
Composite time exposure of a comet. The image features sharp, straight star trails across the sky, with the comet appearing as a fuzzy white point among the circular paths of light.
Far-infrared COBE image of the universe. A diffuse, colorful glow of cosmological dust is visible across the frame, appearing as a textured, grainy haze against a deep, dark background.

Evocative mosaic showing the Earth and Moon together against black space. The Moon's grey, cratered surface contrasts with the Earth's bright blue oceans, swirling white clouds, and frozen Antarctic continent.
False-color Hubble image of a dust disk around a star. The central starlight is blocked by a coronagraph, revealing a thin, warped disk of dust shown in glowing blue and white hues.
Radar image of the surface of Venus. Large arachnoid structures appear as concentric ovals surrounded by a complex, spider-web-like network of fractures across the textured, orange-toned landscape.
Telescope image of the Small Magellanic Cloud. The dwarf irregular galaxy appears as a dense, diffuse cloud of stars with a preponderance of young, bright blue stars against a dark background.
Space photograph of Saturn. The planet features its iconic concentric ring system, with two small moons visible as faint, distinct dots to the right of the gas giant's banded atmosphere.
Far-infrared all-sky projection in representative colors. An S-shaped blue sash of light crosses the frame, with a bright horizontal band of dust marking the Milky Way disk against a diffuse glow.
Processed map of a moon's surface. The grey terrain is heavily cratered, featuring a dark, large crater right of center. The lighting emphasizes the moon's rugged, pockmarked textures.

Wide-angle photograph of the southern sky. Two large, irregular galaxies are visible as dense clouds of stars. A bright red emission nebula is seen on the left, and a globular cluster point of light on the right.

High-resolution image of a supernova remnant. A bright, glowing ring features a new, concentrated yellow spot on its interior. The structure appears as a fiery circle of gas against a dark background.
All-sky microwave map from COBE. The historic map shows temperature variations as red "spots" against a mottled blue background, with the horizontal plane of the galaxy running through the center.

Representative-color photograph of Earth. The image shows the Southern Hemisphere with the white, frozen continent of Antarctica, swirling white cloud systems, and deep blue oceans. Part of South America is visible.

Composite of high-resolution images of Miranda. The moon displays a bewildering variety of terrain, including a bright V-shaped chevron, wild ridges, deep shadowy canyons, and a mix of cratered and smooth surfaces.

Contoured, false-color X-ray image of the Large Magellanic Cloud. The view features bright, energetic sources in shades of purple and red, highlighting a fast-rotating pulsar and hot star cluster cores.
Telescope photograph of Jupiter. Three distinct, dark circular shadows are visible on the gas giant's banded cloud tops, creating high-contrast spots against the planet's atmospheric textures.
Telescopic image of the Witch Head Nebula. The blue-colored reflection nebula features wispy, cloud-like textures and a suggestive profile, set against a dark background speckled with bright stars.
Historical photograph of a long, pencil-shaped satellite. The metallic body is six feet long and six inches in diameter, featuring simple industrial textures and a pointed tip on a rocket stage.
Telescope view of the Rosette Nebula. The flowery emission nebula features vibrant red gas clouds with a cleared central hole containing an open cluster of bright, hot young stars.

High-resolution image of a Martian grand canyon. Steep, rocky slopes fall away from a smooth plateau, revealing striking horizontal rock formations. The image highlights craggy textures across a six-mile width.
Artist's vision from an intergalactic planet. A large, swollen red sun is setting over a dark, rocky landscape. The night sky is nearly empty, flecked only with faint, fuzzy galactic apparitions.
Negative image of a comet featuring a substantial tail blown by the solar wind. A unique, spiky "anti-tail" points in the opposite direction, shown as black streaks against a white sky.

Mars Global Surveyor image of a canyon. The terrain features terraces and channels within a steep-walled valley. The rocky landscape shows signs of erosion and surface collapse across a six-mile width.
Wide-angle reconstruction of Mars. The globe features a massive canyon system across the top and a white polar cap of frozen carbon dioxide at the bottom against a dusty, orange background.

Telescope image showing a small dwarf spheroidal galaxy as an extended, irregular shape below the Milky Way's center. The background is a dense, star-rich field with dark dust obscuring parts of the view.

Stirring floodlit view of a massive rocket on a launch pad. The silver and white metallic structure is illuminated against a dark night sky, highlighting the industrial scale and mechanical complexity.
Computer realization of gas distribution. The image features a dense thicket of wispy hydrogen clouds in a box, representing a large-scale cosmic forest with intricate, web-like filamentary textures.
Photograph from space featuring sinuous, spiky bands of green Southern Lights. The space shuttle's engines are surrounded by a faint glow of charged plasma, set against a background of distant stars.
Martian landscape featuring a long robotic arm with a scoop. In the foreground is an orange box and a gray dome. Rusty soil, rocks, and an orange sky are visible.
Hubble Space Telescope image of a giant pillar of gas and dust. Dense, rounded globules called "EGGs" are visible at the tip, set against a hazy, glowing background of new stars.
False-color radio survey map. No stars are visible; instead, the image features diffuse, arching, and looping clouds of gas clustered near the horizontal plane of the galaxy.
Hubble image of a spiral galaxy with a long, 280,000-light-year tail featuring massive blue star clusters. Distant background galaxies are visible behind the distorted, tadpole-shaped structure.
Composite solar image. A central ultraviolet view of the Sun's surface is surrounded by a telescopic picture showing a gleaming white corona during a total eclipse.
Gallery of six galaxy images. Most are spirals with pink patches of star formation. One panel features a small irregular galaxy with blue star clusters and pinkish gas.
Wide telescopic view featuring a large irregular galaxy and two prominent globular star clusters. The galaxy appears as a dense cloud of stars against a dark background.
Telescope image of a spiral galaxy. A single, bright point of light represents a supernova, positioned within the galaxy's disk against a dark field of stars.
Photograph showing a network of noctilucent clouds. The wispy, high-altitude clouds cast an eerie blue and white glow against a dark evening sky.
Telescope image showing filaments of dark dust that resemble a waterfall. The dust is set against a background of glowing red hydrogen gas in a star-forming region.
Telescopic image of the Sombrero Galaxy. The galaxy features a massive, bright central bulb and a prominent, thick ring of dark, obscuring dust lanes.
False-color drawing of the local solar neighborhood. An orange dot marks the Sun among spherical bubbles of gas and purple filaments of gas shells.
Photograph showing a full moon rising over a lake. The lunar disk is slightly darkened along its upper limb by a curved shadow.
200-degree fisheye photograph of the night sky. The Milky Way arches across the center, cut by dark dust clouds, with a bright comet tail visible near the bottom.
False-color near-infrared image of Saturn's north pole. A massive hurricane vortex resembles a red rose, centered within a large six-sided hexagonal weather pattern.
Near-infrared wide perspective of a molecular cloud. The Horsehead Nebula stands as a dusty pillar topped with stars, alongside the bright reflection nebula NGC 2023.
Representative-color image of the Cygnus Wall. The star-forming region features glowing gas eroded by bright stars and partly hidden by dark dust clouds.
Photograph of a Martian sunset. The Sun appears as a small, bright disk above a distant crater lip, casting a long, diffuse red glow through the dusty atmosphere.
Composite timelapse sequence showing an annular solar eclipse. A 'ring of fire' is formed as the Sun sets over a silhouetted desert landscape with massive rock buttes.
Night photograph featuring a bright blue comet smudge in the sky beyond an abandoned stone church. A person is silhouetted in the foreground.
Digital mosaic of 20 frames showing the Andromeda Galaxy. The large spiral features a bright core and hundreds of billions of stars, surrounded by foreground Milky Way stars.
Photograph of a massive supercell thunderstorm cloud. The colossal system features rotating, jagged sculptured edges and a center filled with rain and dust over a prairie.
Long-exposure photograph of a secluded cove. Milky Way stars and nebulae shine in the background, with a waterfall and beach illuminated by moonlight and artificial light.
Space photograph of Saturn's rings from the unlit side. The normally bright rings appear as dark bands, while a small moon is visible among the concentric structures.
Colorized image of Venus from a spacecraft. The veiled planet shows high-contrast structures in swirling sulfuric acid clouds, with a bright glint reflecting off the upper cloud deck.
Photograph capturing an airplane silhouette and a horizontal band of clouds in front of a partially eclipsed Sun. The Sun's shimmering edges are visible near the horizon.
Telescope image of a face-on spiral galaxy. Winding arms are traced by dark dust clouds and red-tinted star-forming regions, leading to a compact, very bright core.
Clockwise sequence of four extreme ultraviolet images. Bright flashes from X-class solar flares are captured in active regions across the Sun's textured surface.
Telescope image of a comet with a diffuse coma and central nucleus. The comet appears as a hazy white point against a dark, star-filled background.
Composite image featuring an elliptical galaxy. Two large, orange false-color radio lobes extend symmetrically into space, superposed on a survey image of background stars.
Infrared survey plot showing over one million points. A vertical blue sash marks bright Milky Way stars, while the background forms a dense tapestry of galaxy clusters.
Hydrogen-alpha telescopic snapshot of an annular eclipse. A 'ring of fire' surrounds the Moon's silhouette, while solar prominences spike from the Sun's active limb.
Telescope image of an unusually shaped supernova remnant. The Expanding debris cloud appears as an energized, textured web of gas and dust against a dark background.
Telescope image of a globular cluster. The spherical ball is packed with over 100,000 stars, appearing as a dense concentration of light points against a dark void.
Remastered close-up photograph from lunar orbit. The bright, blue-and-white Earth is seen rising above the sharp, grey, and cratered limb of the Moon against a black sky.
Photograph of three planets aligned along the ecliptic plane above a silhouetted mountain skyline. Venus shines most brilliantly, with Saturn and Mercury positioned nearby in the twilight.
Digitally sharpened telescope image of the Dumbbell Nebula. The planetary nebula features a bipolar structure of glowing gas and dust with a central white dwarf star.
Sunset photograph featuring a crescent Moon and bright Venus. Dark storm clouds and a white anvil cloud are silhouetted in the foreground against a deep blue sky.
Night photograph of a wintry landscape with a cottage. Star trails from the Geminid meteor shower rain down, and a green comet coma is visible near a star cluster.
Telescope image of the Crab Nebula. Red filaments represent hydrogen recombination, while green areas show electrons in the magnetic field around a central pulsar spot.
Telephoto photograph of a full Moon. The lunar disk appears large and yellow, rising above the silhouetted pillars of an ancient coastal temple against a dark sky.
Telescope image of the Lobster Nebula. A complex tapestry of blue glowing hydrogen gas, dark dust filaments, and star clusters create an intricate pattern across space.
Snapshot of a planetary conjunction. Venus, Mercury, and Saturn form a triangle in the western evening sky above the distant, warm lights of a city and bay.
Sunset photograph from a beach. The setting Sun floods the horizon with light, illuminating three planets gathered in a triangle above the dark silhouetted pier and water.
Sharp color image of a barred spiral galaxy. Intense star-forming regions sit at the bar ends, with intricate dust lanes cutting across the galaxy's bright central core.
Sharpest visible-light Hubble image of a dusty debris ring. An occulting disk masks the central star's glare, revealing an off-center ring with a sharp inner boundary.
Daytime panoramic view across a mountain peak. White snow and clouds blend into a bright, alien landscape with volcanic cinder cones and an armada of large white observatories.
False-color violet image of the Sun. The chromosphere appears prominent with a crackly texture, bright sunspots, and dark active regions, creating a blueberry-like appearance.
Satellite image of a massive circular geologic structure in the desert. The concentric rings of layered sedimentary rock resemble a 50-kilometer wide bullseye in the sand.
Hubble Space Telescope image of the Red Rectangle nebula. A thick dust torus pinches a spherical outflow into X-shaped cones with distinct, rhythmic rung-like structures.
Photograph of a bright red sprite lightning strike and green auroral streaks. Distant storm clouds are silhouetted at the bottom against the high-altitude colorful light show.
Night photograph showing the Milky Way rising above a pruned oak tree. Dust lanes in the galaxy appear to extend from the tree's silhouetted branches against a bright horizon.
High-resolution frames documentation of a comet impact. An expanding cloud of bright material is seen 13 seconds after collision on the surface of a potato-shaped nucleus.
Ultraviolet telescopic image of a comet. The comet appears as a fuzzy white disk with background stars stretched into short, horizontal trails.
Red-blue 3D anaglyph of an asteroid. The spinning-top-shaped world features a rough surface littered with boulders, creating a stereoscopic effect against a black background.
Hubble Space Telescope image of a grand design spiral galaxy. Hallmarks include bright blue star clusters and intricate winding dust lanes within well-defined spiral arms.
Photograph of a silhouetted cloud bank against a colorful lunar corona. The bat-like apparition is positioned above a historic stone castle on a hill.
Sharp color image of the Needle Galaxy viewed edge-on. A bulging central core of yellowish stars is cut by obscuring dust lanes along the thin galactic plane.
Dramatic five-minute time exposure showing star trails arcing over the glow of a forest fire. The scene includes the silhouetted slope of a volcanic cinder cone.
Composite image of the Sombrero Galaxy. Infrared data showing a glowing red dust ring is superposed on an optical view of the bright central bulb and stellar disk.
Composite portrait of the Witch Head reflection nebula. Dust grains reflect intense bluish starlight, creating a ghostly profile texture against a dark, star-filled background.
Intriguing composite showing the Moon arranged like a caterpillar. Consecutive exposures follow the lunar disk as it passes through the Earth's dark central and pale outer shadows.
Telescope view of a barred spiral galaxy with a central 'theta' shape. The scene includes three spiky foreground stars and three small, fuzzy bluish galaxies.
High-resolution close-up showing the rugged, cratered surface of a comet nucleus. The landscape features deep shadows and sharp, jagged terrains under harsh lighting.
Extraordinary display of solar ice halos. The scene features a 22-degree ring, sundogs, and sun pillars generated by light refracting through atmospheric ice crystals over a ski center.
Photograph of bubbles frozen into clear lake ice. The spherical white pockets are trapped in layers of exceptionally transparent blue ice during winter.
Photograph of a bright, colorful meteor fireball. The trail transitions from blue-green to red, leaving a visible ionization streak across a dark, starry atmosphere.
Illusory-color infrared mosaic of the Orion Nebula. The image features a bustling neighborhood of young stars, hot gas, and intricate dust filaments in vibrant orange and yellow.
Photograph taken through a polarizing filter showing a sundog. A small rainbow-like patch of light appears to the side of a setting Sun in a cloudy sky.
Photograph of a powerful orange laser beam shooting from a large telescope site toward the center of the Milky Way, appearing as an artificial star in the sky.
Multiple exposure composite showing a lunar analemma. The Moon disks trace a figure-8 curve over a mountain range through various phases including thin crescents.
Highest resolution image of Kuiper Belt object Ultima Thule. The world appears as a contact binary with two connected sphere-like lobes and a pockmarked surface.
Multicolored telescopic image of the Rho Ophiuchi clouds. Regions of blue reflection, red and yellow gas emission, and dark dust patches create a highly textured star field.
Combination of 800 exposures showing the constellation Taurus. Two star clusters, parallel meteor trails, and a green comet coma are visible among bright colorful stars.
Sharp color composite of spiral galaxy NGC 4725. The galaxy features a single winding spiral arm with blue star clusters, red star-forming regions, and a central bar.
Photograph from a summit at sunrise. The Sun peaks above a thick sea of white clouds, lighting the horizon in vibrant, saturated red hues.
Dramatic photograph of a rocket launch. Bright glare and billowing exhaust plumes from a solid fuel rocket punctuate a clear afternoon sky.
Panoramic nightscape of a boreal landscape. The Milky Way arch and green aurora flow over a spectacular waterfall, with bright Jupiter and a faint Andromeda galaxy visible.
False-color Hubble composite of the Trapezium star cluster. Young stellar systems appear as globs of gas and dust with structures pointing away from bright central stars.
Long-exposure composite showing full circle star trails. The colorful concentric arcs revolve around the North Celestial Pole above a silhouetted city skyline.
Artist's illustration of Kuiper belt object Ultima Thule. The world is depicted as a contact binary system with two lobes in the dim light of a distant Sun.
Telescopic close-up of the Great Carina Nebula. The image features glowing gas filaments, obscuring dust clouds, and the brilliant massive star Eta Carinae near the Keyhole Nebula.
Namibian night skyscape of a comet. The view features a绿Green coma, a bright off-white dust tail, and a flowing, blue sculptured ion tail.
Digital composition of 70 meteor streaks radiating from a single point. The Milky Way, Orion, and a green comet coma share the dark predawn sky.
Widefield telescopic image of a comet. The comet features a broad dust tail and an extensive anti-tail stretching over 3 degrees across a star-rich background.
Telescope image of the HCG 87 galaxy group. The view features a large edge-on spiral, a fuzzy elliptical galaxy, and a smaller distant spiral against a black void.
Twilight photograph of the Rocky Mountains. A young crescent Moon and planet Venus appear close together above a hazy horizon obscured by forest fire smoke.
Photograph of a rare roll cloud. The long, horizontal cylindrical cloud extends far into the distance, completely detached from the darker clouds above a beach.
Side-by-side before and after images of a spiral galaxy. The right frame features a new, bright point of light representing a nearby supernova in the spiral arm.
Hubble Space Telescope image showing an unexpectedly bright plume of material emanating from a comet's nucleus after a spacecraft impact, then dispersing into space.
Unusual vista from the Martian surface showing three massive rover wheels. In the distance, the rocky slope of a large mountain rises under a hazy sky.
Telescope image of the Orion Nebula in specific hydrogen, oxygen, and sulfur colors. The view features glowing gas, hot young stars, and prominent filamentary shock wave structures.
Composite of three X-ray colors showing a puffy, expanding nebula. The hot gas cloud from Tycho's supernova remnant appears as a textured, colorful sphere against a dark background.
Hubble mosaic of active galaxy Centaurus A. The image features a fantastic jumble of blue star clusters, glowing gas clouds, and imposing dark dust lanes in natural color.
Robotic spacecraft image of a Martian crater. A 35-kilometer wide basin features a bright, frozen patch of water ice on its floor, partially shaded by high walls.
Telescopic view of a comet with a magnificent, long and narrow anti-tail. The tail stretches across the frame, appearing to point in the sunward direction against a starfield.
Stereo picture of two elongated craters on the dark, smooth lunar Sea of Fertility. The pair features bright rays of material extending along the dusty surface.
Ringscape from the Cassini spacecraft. The icy moon Tethys is caught in sunlight outside Saturn's main rings, with concentric shadows playing across the broad ring system.
Telescopic image of a sprawling spiral galaxy. The island universe features blue star clusters and pink star-forming regions along arms seen through a veil of foreground stars.
Sharp Hubble close-up of a planetary nebula with a 3-light-year wingspan. A dense torus of dust surrounds an exceptionally hot central star, cutting across ionized gas cavities.
Wide celestial composite centered on the Ring Nebula. The image captures the inner nebula, faint outer hydrogen rings, and a distant background barred spiral galaxy.
Ultraviolet mosaic of the Large Magellanic Cloud. Massive young stars shine brightly in blue and ultraviolet hues, highlighting active star-forming regions like the Tarantula Nebula.
False-color X-ray view of a globular cluster. The image shows a dense neighborhood of bright X-ray star points within the closely packed central core.
Composite night skyscape showing 30 meteor trails radiating from a single point. A greenish comet coma is visible above a volcanic peak and a telescope dome.
Photograph from the Moon's farside inside Von Karman crater. A desk-sized rover with six wheels is shown rolling down ramps from a lander onto the dusty surface.
Sharp telescope view centered on a supernova remnant filament. Glowing ripples of atomic hydrogen (red) and oxygen (blue-green) gas form a structure resembling a broom against stars.
Telescope image of the NGC 3582 nebula. The scene features dense knots of dark dust, bright stars, and fields of glowing red hydrogen gas ionized by massive stars.
Time-lapse sequence of a total lunar eclipse. The Moon disks transition from white to dark red as they move across a night sky background.
Photograph showing a hole in a white ceiling where a meteorite crashed through. An inset shows a metallic, rocky meteorite next to a dent in a wall.
Serene sunset image composite follows the dotted trails of four planets dropping toward the western horizon. The lights reflect in the shallow, still waters of a salt lake.
Broad starscape mosaic showing two large nebulae in the Sagittarius arm. Both cosmic clouds feature reddish hydrogen emission and dusty dark regions within a star-rich field.
Compilation selfie of a robotic lander on Mars. The bus-sized spacecraft features large solar panels and an orange-domed instrument on the rocky, dusty surface.
Telescope image showing unusual gas filaments artificially colored pink around a central galaxy. The scene features a spectacular collision of galactic structures within a cluster.
Five-hour composite exposure showing three meteor streaks pointing back to a radiant point. The Milky Way arches through the dark sky above two large observatory telescope structures.
Photograph of a space shuttle launch from a floodlit pad. A massive column of fire and smoke rises into the dark evening sky at Cape Canaveral.
Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter image of linear gullies. Long, straight grooves of constant width extend for kilometers on the sides of sandy slopes with raised banks.
Night composite of seven images showing the constellation Orion above snowy Alpine peaks and icicles. The Orion Nebula and four bright surrounding stars are prominently visible.
Deep image of a remarkably simple, spherical planetary nebula. The ghostly sphere appears as a translucent bubble of gas with a central star against a background of distant galaxies.
Time-lapse sequence showing a Moon undergoing a total lunar eclipse. Multiple Moon disks move in an arc over the towers of a gothic cathedral, transitioning to deep red.
High-resolution image of a pockmarked moon surface. The moon features an unusually coarse, sponge-like texture with numerous craters that have distinct dark centers.
Night skyscape featuring the silhouetted Matterhorn mountain next to a dark red eclipsed Moon. A colorful meteor flash is visible below the Moon, tracing a climbing route.
Spectacular digital collage visualizing space-related images as a classic film reel winding through the frame against a black background.
Eclipse image composite featuring a dim red Moon. An inset close-up highlights a small, bright optical flash near the Moon's darkened western limb.
Telephoto view through hazy skies showing a crescent Sun in partial eclipse. A traditional Chinese pavilion on a hilltop is silhouetted in the foreground.
Massive 200-frame mosaic of a supernova remnant. The 16-degree wide view features glowing red gas filaments and embedded star clusters along the plane of the Milky Way.
Dark night skyscape showing a luminous, colorful band of stars cut by dark dust clouds. A hiking trail leads into the foreground under the arching Milky Way.
Panoramic night skyscape from the Atacama desert. The Milky Way rises over a small flowing creek, with two neighboring galaxies visible above the dark horizon.
Composite night photograph from a mountain peak. A bright, colorful meteor trail slashes down next to the nearly vertical band of the Milky Way galaxy.
Festively colored skyscape showing a green comet coma below a blue star cluster. A reddish emission nebula is visible on the left across dusty dark regions.
Three-color montage of two bright emission nebulae. The Heart and Soul nebulas shine in red hydrogen, yellow sulfur, and blue oxygen light, with young star clusters visible.
Sharp telescopic portrait of an edge-on spiral galaxy. A puffy galactic disk is divided by dark dust lanes, showing an extended flare and warp.
Digitally expanded and artificially brightened telescope frame showing a faint, slowly moving white dot against a dark, star-filled field.
Telescope image of the solar disk. Two dark patches in silhouette on the Sun represent the International Space Station and a space shuttle in transit.
Composite image following the Sun's path toward the horizon on a clear solstice day. The photographer's small figure is silhouetted against a coastal castle wall.
False-color composite image of a spiral galaxy with a long red gas streak attached. A neighboring galaxy appears red and lacks young blue stars.
Deep telescopic view of an island universe spiral galaxy. Striking arms are traced by blue star clusters and reddish nurseries, with a compact bright core.
Artist's drawing of a distant icy object. The world appears as a cold, dark sphere in the Kuiper Belt, with the Sun visible as an unusually bright star.
Single exposure night image showing a mountain cabin and wooden sled under a star-filled sky. A pale band of the Milky Way and bright stars are visible.
Composite of 200 stacked digital exposures showing colorful concentric star trails. The arcs revolve around a point behind a silhouetted white telescope dome.
Photograph from space showing a shuttle orbiter doing a back flip near the International Space Station. Cargo bay doors are open toward a distant, blue-and-white Earth.
High-resolution image of a Kuiper belt object. The world features two connected nearly-spherical lobes with an unusual surface texture and relatively few craters.
Computer reconstruction of the surface of Venus using radar data. The orange-toned landscape features large circular domes typically 25 kilometers across.
Telescope image of the Andromeda Galaxy. The large spiral features a diffuse white glow from billions of stars, surrounded by several distinct foreground Milky Way stars.
Sharp cosmic vista featuring a pair of spiral galaxies with dust lanes and star clusters. A lonely elliptical galaxy is also visible in the cluster field.
Artist's vision from the surface of a hypothetical rocky moon. A hot gas giant planet is visible in a triple star system with three setting suns.
Photograph of an intermittent green fan-shaped glow in the night sky. The arch of the Milky Way spans above a lake reflecting the colorful patterns.
Spectacular portion of the Lagoon Nebula in scientifically-assigned colors. Light from hydrogen, silicon, and oxygen reveals red-glowing gas and intricate dark dust filaments.
Star cluster portrait featuring a young swarm of bright stars. A small, colorful patch of glowing gas represents an ancient planetary nebula interloper among the clusters.
Composite image of 51 meteor streaks radiating from a single point in a dark sky. The tracks appear to converge due to perspective above silhouetted trees.
Hubble Space Telescope image of the Porpoise Galaxy. The distorted spiral features a nose of young blue stars and intricate dark dust lanes trailing to the right.
Meticulously processed wide-angle image of a total solar eclipse. Intricate layers of the white corona stream from the Sun, with Mars and hundreds of stars visible.
Hubble palette color composite of an emission nebula. The image features glowing ionized hydrogen, sulfur, and oxygen powered by an embedded star cluster.
Photograph of green and red auroral curtains. The shimmering vertical patterns are captured high above a dark, snowy landscape.
Night photograph of a Super Moon rising over a river mouth. The bright lunar light creates a magnificent, perfect 22-degree circular halo in the thin clouds.
Telescope image of a luminous superbubble nebula. The circular gas structure is 300 light-years in diameter, filled with hot, expanding gas in our neighboring galaxy.
Clear Hubble image of the Ring Nebula. The view features a dense green and cyan donut-like ring around a football-shaped cloud with reddish outer edges.
Night photograph showing bright Mars above a red rocky desert landscape. The planet appears as a brilliant point of light in a deep blue twilight sky.
Thirteen-pane mosaic showing a comet with a remarkably long anti-tail. The fanned-out dust trail stretches over 7 degrees from the coma against a starfield.
Morning photograph of a thin crescent Moon and bright Venus appearing close together. The Moon exhibits Earthshine, silhouetted behind the branches of a foreground tree.
Twilight photograph from a beach showing a pinkish band in the atmosphere above the horizon. The Belt of Venus sits between the blue and dark sky.
Six-frame panorama of Crater Lake. A brilliant Milky Way arch spans the sky over a green airglow layer and a dark volcanic caldera filled with water.
Thirty-image panorama from a dark lagoon. The Milky Way arch connects the horizon, featuring the Moon, three planets, satellite galaxies, and red airglow.
False-color image of two emission nebulas. The Heart and Soul nebulas shine in the red light of energized hydrogen, populated by young open star clusters.
Telescopic image of NGC 7129. Bluish dust clouds reflect starlight, while small deep-red crescent shapes mark shocked hydrogen gas from newborn star jets.
Wide-angle night panorama of a coastline. Two lightning strikes are captured over different landmasses beneath a star-filled sky and the arching band of the Milky Way.
Sharp telescopic snapshot of the Cigar Galaxy. Reddish hues highlight long outflow filaments of hydrogen gas extending from the galaxy's central regions.
Computer-generated side-by-side comparison. The left shows a radar-imaged Venus with a bright orange highland region; the right shows a blue and white Earth for scale.
False-color image of a moon's sponge-textured surface. Strange craters with unknown dark material at the bottom are strewn across a generally odd, lumpy terrain.
False-color X-ray image of a supernova remnant. An expanding outer ring of shock-heated gas surrounds a central region rich in neon and oxygen in a neighboring galaxy.
Telescopic field of view featuring a bright green comet coma at the upper left. A sharp, edge-on spiral galaxy is visible at the lower right among stars.
Composite eclipse image tracing a circular shadow. Successive Moon disks transition to red during totality, while the lunar limb shows a distinct blue hue near the edge.
Deep, colorful composite of the Large Magellanic Cloud. The irregular galaxy features the prominent, bright red Tarantula Nebula and various young star-forming regions.
Telescopic night skyscape of a large full Moon rising. The yellow lunar disk looms large above the silhouetted ancient pillars of a coastal temple.
Extreme ultraviolet image from the TRACE satellite. Majestic, hot coronal loops of solar plasma emerge from and return to the Sun's textured surface in clusters.
Artist's illustration of Ultima Thule. The Kuiper belt object is depicted as two connected lobes, one shaped like a pancake and the other like a walnut.
Telescope picture of the Helix Nebula. Oxygen emission is blue and hydrogen is red, showing complex geometry with radial filaments and outer gas loops resembling an eye.
